---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Overdispersion"
date: "2026-05-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(COUNT)
data("medpar")
datak=medpar
colnames(datak)
mean(datak$los)
var(datak$los)
plot(datak)
```
##train & split
```{r}
set.seed(123)
traina=sample(1:nrow(datak),0.7*nrow(datak))
train_1=datak[traina,]
head(train_1)
test_1=datak[-traina,]
trainb=sample(1:nrow(datak),0.8*nrow(datak))
train_2=datak[trainb,]
test_2=datak[-trainb,]
trainc=sample(1:nrow(datak),0.9*nrow(datak))
train_3=datak[trainc,]
test_3=datak[-trainc,]
```


```{r}
#========================================
# REPEATED HOLDOUT VALIDATION
#========================================

set.seed(123)

#----------------------------------------
# Number of repetitions
#----------------------------------------

B <- 100

#----------------------------------------
# Sample sizes
#----------------------------------------

n <- nrow(datak)

n70 <- round(0.70 * n)

n80 <- round(0.80 * n)

n90 <- round(0.90 * n)

#========================================
# EMPTY LISTS
#========================================

split_70 <- vector("list", B)

split_80 <- vector("list", B)

split_90 <- vector("list", B)

#========================================
# GENERATE SPLITS
#========================================

for(i in 1:B){

  #====================================
  # 70% TRAIN SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_index70 <- sample(
    1:n,
    size = n70,
    replace = FALSE
  )

  split_70[[i]] <- list(

    train = datak[train_index70, ],

    test  = datak[-train_index70, ]
  )

  #====================================
  # 80% TRAIN SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_index80 <- sample(
    1:n,
    size = n80,
    replace = FALSE
  )

  split_80[[i]] <- list(

    train = datak[train_index80, ],

    test  = datak[-train_index80, ]
  )

  #====================================
  # 90% TRAIN SPLIT
  #====================================

  train_index90 <- sample(
    1:n,
    size = n90,
    replace = FALSE
  )

  split_90[[i]] <- list(

    train = datak[train_index90, ],

    test  = datak[-train_index90, ]
  )
}

```

##poisson

```{r}
library(MASS)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_pois <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("POISSON : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test


  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_pois <- glm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = poisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_1
  )
aic_pois70 <- AIC(model_pois)

bic_pois70 <- BIC(model_pois)
  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_pois <- predict(

    model_pois,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_pois
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_pois <- pred_pois[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_pois <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_pois,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # POISSON PREDICTIVE INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_pois <- qpois(

    0.025,

    lambda = pred_pois
  )

  upper_pois <- qpois(

    0.975,

    lambda = pred_pois
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_pois <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_pois &
    actual1 <= upper_pois
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_pois <- mean(

    upper_pois - lower_pois
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_pois <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_pois,

    Lower_PI = lower_pois,

    Upper_PI = upper_pois
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "POISSON_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_pois
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_pois <- rbind(

  results_pois,

  data.frame(

    Split = i,

    AIC = aic_pois,

    BIC = bic_pois,

    ME = acc_pois[1,"ME"],

    RMSE = acc_pois[1,"RMSE"],

    MAE = acc_pois[1,"MAE"],

    MPE = acc_pois[1,"MPE"],

    MAPE = acc_pois[1,"MAPE"],

    Coverage = coverage_pois,

    Width = width_pois
  )
)
  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_pois, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_pois, "\n")
}
```

#table
```{r}
summary_pois <- data.frame(

  Model = "Poisson",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_pois$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_pois$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_pois$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_pois$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_pois$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_pois$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_pois$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_pois$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_pois$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_pois
```
#80

```{r}
#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_pois80 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("POISSON 80 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_1 <- split_80[[i]]$train
  test_1  <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_pois80 <- glm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = poisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_1
  )

  aic_pois80 <- AIC(model_pois80)

  bic_pois80 <- BIC(model_pois80)

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_pois80 <- predict(

    model_pois80,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_pois80
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_pois80 <- pred_pois80[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_pois80 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_pois80,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_pois80 <- qpois(
    0.025,
    lambda = pred_pois80
  )

  upper_pois80 <- qpois(
    0.975,
    lambda = pred_pois80
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_pois80 <- mean(
    actual1 >= lower_pois80 &
    actual1 <= upper_pois80
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_pois80 <- mean(
    upper_pois80 - lower_pois80
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_pois80 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_pois80,

    Lower_PI = lower_pois80,

    Upper_PI = upper_pois80
  )

  assign(
    paste0("POIS80_SPLIT_", i),
    split_pois80
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_pois80 <- rbind(

    results_pois80,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      AIC = as.numeric(aic_pois80),

      BIC = as.numeric(bic_pois80),

      ME = as.numeric(acc_pois80[1,"ME"]),

      RMSE = as.numeric(acc_pois80[1,"RMSE"]),

      MAE = as.numeric(acc_pois80[1,"MAE"]),

      MPE = as.numeric(acc_pois80[1,"MPE"]),

      MAPE = as.numeric(acc_pois80[1,"MAPE"]),

      Coverage = as.numeric(coverage_pois80),

      Width = as.numeric(width_pois80)
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_pois80, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_pois80, "\n")
}

```
#table
```{r}
summary_pois80 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Poisson",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(results_pois80$AIC),

  Mean_BIC = mean(results_pois80$BIC),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_pois80$ME),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_pois80$RMSE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_pois80$MAE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_pois80$MPE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_pois80$MAPE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_pois80$Coverage),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_pois80$Width)
)

summary_pois80
```
#90
```{r}
#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_pois90 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("POISSON 90 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_pois90 <- glm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = poisson(link = "log"),

    data = train_1
  )

  aic_pois90 <- AIC(model_pois90)

  bic_pois90 <- BIC(model_pois90)

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_pois90 <- predict(

    model_pois90,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_pois90
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_pois90 <- pred_pois90[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_pois90 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_pois90,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # POISSON PREDICTIVE INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_pois90 <- qpois(

    0.025,

    lambda = pred_pois90
  )

  upper_pois90 <- qpois(

    0.975,

    lambda = pred_pois90
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_pois90 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_pois90 &
    actual1 <= upper_pois90
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_pois90 <- mean(

    upper_pois90 - lower_pois90
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_pois90 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_pois90,

    Lower_PI = lower_pois90,

    Upper_PI = upper_pois90
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "POIS90_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_pois90
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_pois90 <- rbind(

    results_pois90,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      AIC = as.numeric(aic_pois90),

      BIC = as.numeric(bic_pois90),

      ME = as.numeric(acc_pois90[1,"ME"]),

      RMSE = as.numeric(acc_pois90[1,"RMSE"]),

      MAE = as.numeric(acc_pois90[1,"MAE"]),

      MPE = as.numeric(acc_pois90[1,"MPE"]),

      MAPE = as.numeric(acc_pois90[1,"MAPE"]),

      Coverage = as.numeric(coverage_pois90),

      Width = as.numeric(width_pois90)
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_pois90, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_pois90, "\n")
}
```
#table
```{r}

summary_pois90 <- data.frame(

  Model = "Poisson",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_AIC = mean(results_pois90$AIC, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_BIC = mean(results_pois90$BIC, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_ME = mean(results_pois90$ME, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_pois90$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_pois90$MAE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_pois90$MPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_pois90$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_pois90$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_pois90$Width, na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_pois90
```



##NB
```{r}
#========================================
# NEGATIVE BINOMIAL MODEL
# FOR 100 SPLITS
#========================================

library(MASS)
library(Metrics)
library(forecast)
```



```{r}
#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLES
#========================================

results_nb_70 <- data.frame()

results_nb_80 <- data.frame()

results_nb_90 <- data.frame()
```

##70 split
```{r}

#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_nb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NB1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_nb1 <- glm.nb(
    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_nb1 <- predict(
    model_nb1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_nb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_nb1 <- pred_nb1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_nb1 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_nb1,
    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #====================================

  theta_nb1 <- model_nb1$theta

  #====================================
  # PARAMETRIC QUANTILE PI
  #====================================

  lower_nb1 <- qnbinom(
    0.025,
    mu = pred_nb1,
    size = theta_nb1
  )

  upper_nb1 <- qnbinom(
    0.975,
    mu = pred_nb1,
    size = theta_nb1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_nb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_nb1 &
    actual1 <= upper_nb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_nb1 <- mean(
    upper_nb1 - lower_nb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_nb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_nb1,

    Lower_PI = lower_nb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_nb1
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "NB1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_nb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_nb1 <- rbind(

    results_nb1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_nb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_nb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_nb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_nb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_nb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_nb1,

      Width = width_nb1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_nb1, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_nb1, "\n")
}

```

```{r}
mean(
  results_nb1$Coverage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

mean(
  results_nb1$Width,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

summary_nb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "NB1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_nb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_nb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb1
```


##80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# NB2 : 80% SPLITS
# PARAMETRIC QUANTILE PI
#========================================

results_nb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NB2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_nb2 <- glm.nb(
    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_nb2 <- predict(
    model_nb2,
    newdata = test_2,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_nb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_nb2 <- pred_nb2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_nb2 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_nb2,
    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #====================================

  theta_nb2 <- model_nb2$theta

  #====================================
  # PARAMETRIC QUANTILE PI
  #====================================

  lower_nb2 <- qnbinom(
    0.025,
    mu = pred_nb2,
    size = theta_nb2
  )

  upper_nb2 <- qnbinom(
    0.975,
    mu = pred_nb2,
    size = theta_nb2
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_nb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_nb2 &
    actual2 <= upper_nb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_nb2 <- mean(
    upper_nb2 - lower_nb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_nb2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_nb2,

    Lower_PI = lower_nb2,

    Upper_PI = upper_nb2
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "NB2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_nb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_nb2 <- rbind(

    results_nb2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_nb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_nb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_nb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_nb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_nb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_nb2,

      Width = width_nb2
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_nb2, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_nb2, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# NB2 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

mean(
  results_nb2$Coverage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

mean(
  results_nb2$Width,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

summary_nb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "NB2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_nb2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_nb2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb2
```




##90 splt
```{r}
#========================================
# NB3 : 90% SPLITS
# PARAMETRIC QUANTILE PI
#========================================

results_nb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("NB3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_nb3 <- glm.nb(
    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_nb3 <- predict(
    model_nb3,
    newdata = test_3,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_nb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_nb3 <- pred_nb3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_nb3 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_nb3,
    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #====================================

  theta_nb3 <- model_nb3$theta

  #====================================
  # PARAMETRIC QUANTILE PI
  #====================================

  lower_nb3 <- qnbinom(
    0.025,
    mu = pred_nb3,
    size = theta_nb3
  )

  upper_nb3 <- qnbinom(
    0.975,
    mu = pred_nb3,
    size = theta_nb3
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_nb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_nb3 &
    actual3 <= upper_nb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_nb3 <- mean(
    upper_nb3 - lower_nb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_nb3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_nb3,

    Lower_PI = lower_nb3,

    Upper_PI = upper_nb3
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "NB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_nb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_nb3 <- rbind(

    results_nb3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_nb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_nb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_nb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_nb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_nb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_nb3,

      Width = width_nb3
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_nb3, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_nb3, "\n")
}
```

```{r}

#====================================
# NB3 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

mean(
  results_nb3$Coverage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

mean(
  results_nb3$Width,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

summary_nb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "NB3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_nb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_nb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_nb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_nb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_nb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_nb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_nb3$Width,
    
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_nb3
```



##qusi-poisson

#70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# QUASI1 : 70% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# USING NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
#========================================

library(forecast)

#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_quasi1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_quasi1 <- glm(
    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
    family = quasipoisson,
    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_quasi1 <- predict(
    model_quasi1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_quasi1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_quasi1 <- pred_quasi1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_quasi1 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_quasi1,
    actual1
  )

  #=====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #=====================================

  phi_quasi1 <- summary(
    model_quasi1
  )$dispersion

  #=====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #=====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi1),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi1)){

    #--------------------------------
    # PREDICTED MEAN
    #--------------------------------

    mu_i1 <- pred_quasi1[j]

    #--------------------------------
    # NB SIZE PARAMETER
    #--------------------------------

    theta_i1 <- mu_i1 /
      (phi_quasi1 - 1)

    #--------------------------------
    # ENSURE POSITIVE THETA
    #--------------------------------

    theta_i1 <- max(
      theta_i1,
      0.001
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # NB SIMULATION
    #--------------------------------

    sim_quasi1[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i1,

      size = theta_i1
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_quasi1 <- apply(
    sim_quasi1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi1 <- apply(
    sim_quasi1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_quasi1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_quasi1 &
    actual1 <= upper_quasi1
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_quasi1 <- mean(

    upper_quasi1 - lower_quasi1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_quasi1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_quasi1,

    Lower_PI = lower_quasi1,

    Upper_PI = upper_quasi1
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "QUASI1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_quasi1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_quasi1 <- rbind(

    results_quasi1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_quasi1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi1,

      Width = width_quasi1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_quasi1, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_quasi1, "\n")
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# QUASI1 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_quasi1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "QUASI1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi1
```


##80 split
```{r}
#========================================
# QUASI2 : 80% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# USING NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
#========================================

#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_quasi2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_quasi2 <- glm(
    los ~ hmo + died + type +white,
    family = quasipoisson,
    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_quasi2 <- predict(
    model_quasi2,
    newdata = test_2,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_quasi2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_quasi2 <- pred_quasi2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_quasi2 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_quasi2,
    actual2
  )

  #=====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #=====================================

  phi_quasi2 <- summary(
    model_quasi2
  )$dispersion

  #=====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #=====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi2),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi2)){

    mu_i2 <- pred_quasi2[j]

    theta_i2 <- mu_i2 /
      (phi_quasi2 - 1)

    theta_i2 <- max(
      theta_i2,
      0.001
    )

    sim_quasi2[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i2,

      size = theta_i2
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_quasi2 <- apply(
    sim_quasi2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi2 <- apply(
    sim_quasi2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_quasi2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_quasi2 &
    actual2 <= upper_quasi2
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_quasi2 <- mean(

    upper_quasi2 - lower_quasi2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_quasi2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_quasi2,

    Lower_PI = lower_quasi2,

    Upper_PI = upper_quasi2
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "QUASI2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_quasi2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_quasi2 <- rbind(

    results_quasi2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_quasi2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi2,

      Width = width_quasi2
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_quasi2, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_quasi2, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# QUASI2 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_quasi2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "QUASI2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi2
```





##90 split


```{r}
#========================================
# QUASI3 : 90% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# USING NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
#========================================

#========================================
# EMPTY RESULT TABLE
#========================================

results_quasi3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("QUASI3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_quasi3 <- glm(
    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
    family = quasipoisson,
    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_quasi3 <- predict(
    model_quasi3,
    newdata = test_3,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_quasi3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_quasi3 <- pred_quasi3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_quasi3 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_quasi3,
    actual3
  )

  #=====================================
  # DISPERSION PARAMETER
  #=====================================

  phi_quasi3 <- summary(
    model_quasi3
  )$dispersion

  #=====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #=====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_quasi3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_quasi3),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_quasi3)){

    mu_i3 <- pred_quasi3[j]

    theta_i3 <- mu_i3 /
      (phi_quasi3 - 1)

    theta_i3 <- max(
      theta_i3,
      0.001
    )

    sim_quasi3[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i3,

      size = theta_i3
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_quasi3 <- apply(
    sim_quasi3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_quasi3 <- apply(
    sim_quasi3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_quasi3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_quasi3 &
    actual3 <= upper_quasi3
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_quasi3 <- mean(

    upper_quasi3 - lower_quasi3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_quasi3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_quasi3,

    Lower_PI = lower_quasi3,

    Upper_PI = upper_quasi3
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "QUASI3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_quasi3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_quasi3 <- rbind(

    results_quasi3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_quasi3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_quasi3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_quasi3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_quasi3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_quasi3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_quasi3,

      Width = width_quasi3
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_quasi3, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_quasi3, "\n")
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# QUASI3 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_quasi3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "QUASI3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_quasi3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_quasi3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_quasi3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_quasi3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_quasi3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_quasi3
```




## generalised poisson
# 70 split

```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(VGAM)

#========================================
# GP1 : 70% SPLITS
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_gp1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GP1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT GENERALIZED POISSON MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_gp1 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +white,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_gp1 <- predict(
    model_gp1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

 
#====================================
# MATCH LENGTHS
#====================================

min_len <- min(

  length(actual1),

  length(pred_gp1)
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  1:min_len
]

pred_gp1 <- pred_gp1[
  1:min_len
]
#------------------------------------
# REMOVE INVALID VALUES
#------------------------------------
  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_gp1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_gp1 <- pred_gp1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_gp1 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_gp1,
    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # CONFORMAL SCORES
  #====================================

  conformal_scores1 <- abs(
    actual1 - pred_gp1
  )

  #====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #====================================

  qhat_gp1 <- quantile(

    conformal_scores1,

    probs = 0.95,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #====================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #====================================

  lower_gp1 <- pred_gp1 - qhat_gp1

  upper_gp1 <- pred_gp1 + qhat_gp1

  lower_gp1 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gp1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_gp1 &
    actual1 <= upper_gp1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gp1 <- mean(

    upper_gp1 - lower_gp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_gp1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_gp1,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp1,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp1
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gp1 <- rbind(

    results_gp1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gp1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gp1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gp1,

      Width = width_gp1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_gp1, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_gp1, "\n")
}
```


```{r}
summary_gp1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GP1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_gp1$ME, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_gp1$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_gp1$MAE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_gp1$MPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_gp1$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_gp1$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_gp1$Width, na.rm = TRUE)
)
```



##80 split
```{r}
#========================================
# GP2 : 80% SPLITS
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_gp2 <- data.frame()

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GP2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

 
  model_gp2 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_2
  )

  pred_gp2 <- predict(
    model_gp2,
    newdata = test_2,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  
  #====================================
# MATCH LENGTHS
#====================================

min_len <- min(

  length(actual2),

  length(pred_gp2)
)

actual2 <- actual2[
  1:min_len
]

pred_gp2 <- pred_gp2[
  1:min_len
]
  
  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_gp2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_gp2 <- pred_gp2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  acc_gp2 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_gp2,
    actual2
  )

  conformal_scores2 <- abs(
    actual2 - pred_gp2
  )

  qhat_gp2 <- quantile(
    conformal_scores2,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_gp2 <- pred_gp2 - qhat_gp2

  upper_gp2 <- pred_gp2 + qhat_gp2

  lower_gp2 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp2
  )

  coverage_gp2 <- mean(
    actual2 >= lower_gp2 &
    actual2 <= upper_gp2
  )

  width_gp2 <- mean(
    upper_gp2 - lower_gp2
  )

  split_gp2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_gp2,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp2,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp2
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gp2
  )

  results_gp2 <- rbind(

    results_gp2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gp2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gp2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gp2,

      Width = width_gp2
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_gp2, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_gp2, "\n")
}
```


```{r}
summary_gp2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GP2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_gp2$ME, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_gp2$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_gp2$MAE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_gp2$MPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_gp2$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_gp2$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_gp2$Width, na.rm = TRUE)
)

```



##90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# GP3 : 90% SPLITS
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_gp3 <- data.frame()

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GP3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

 
  model_gp3 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = genpoisson0(),

    data = train_3
  )

  pred_gp3 <- predict(
    model_gp3,
    newdata = test_3,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  
#====================================
# MATCH LENGTHS
#====================================

min_len <- min(

  length(actual3),

  length(pred_gp3)
)

actual3 <- actual3[
  1:min_len
]

pred_gp3 <- pred_gp3[
  1:min_len
]
  
  
  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_gp3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_gp3 <- pred_gp3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  acc_gp3 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_gp3,
    actual3
  )

  conformal_scores3 <- abs(
    actual3 - pred_gp3
  )

  qhat_gp3 <- quantile(
    conformal_scores3,
    probs = 0.95,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  lower_gp3 <- pred_gp3 - qhat_gp3

  upper_gp3 <- pred_gp3 + qhat_gp3

  lower_gp3 <- pmax(
    0,
    lower_gp3
  )

  coverage_gp3 <- mean(
    actual3 >= lower_gp3 &
    actual3 <= upper_gp3
  )

  width_gp3 <- mean(
    upper_gp3 - lower_gp3
  )

  split_gp3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_gp3,

    Lower_PI = lower_gp3,

    Upper_PI = upper_gp3
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GP3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gp3
  )

  results_gp3 <- rbind(

    results_gp3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gp3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gp3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gp3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gp3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gp3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gp3,

      Width = width_gp3
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_gp3, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_gp3, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
summary_gp3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GP3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_gp3$ME, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_gp3$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_gp3$MAE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_gp3$MPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_gp3$MAPE, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_gp3$Coverage, na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_gp3$Width, na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_gp3
```


##generalised NB

#70 split

```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(VGAM)

#========================================
# GNB1 : 70% SPLITS
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# FULL FIXED VERSION
#========================================

results_gnb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$white <- factor(train_1$white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(
    test_1$type,
    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$white<- factor(
    test_1$white,
    levels = levels(train_1$white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT GNB MODEL
  #====================================

  gnb_model1 <- tryCatch(

    vglm(

      los ~ hmo + died + type +white,

      family = genpoisson2(),

      data = train_1
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED MODELS
  #====================================

  if(is.null(gnb_model1)) next

  #====================================
  # SAFE PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      gnb_model1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$los),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # CONVERT TO NUMERIC
  #====================================

  pred_gnb1 <- as.numeric(
    pred_gnb1
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # FIX LENGTH MISMATCH
  #====================================

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual1),

    length(pred_gnb1)
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_gnb1 <- pred_gnb1[
    1:min_len
  ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,

    pred_gnb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_gnb1 <- pred_gnb1[keep]

  #====================================
  # FIX BAD PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb1[
    is.na(pred_gnb1)
  ] <- mean(actual1)

  pred_gnb1[
    is.nan(pred_gnb1)
  ] <- mean(actual1)

  pred_gnb1[
    is.infinite(pred_gnb1)
  ] <- mean(actual1)

  pred_gnb1[
    pred_gnb1 <= 0
  ] <- 0.001

  #====================================
  # CHECK SAMPLE SIZE
  #====================================

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_gnb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb1,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIZE PARAMETER
  #====================================

  size_gnb1 <- tryCatch(

    coef(gnb_model1)[1],

    error = function(e) NA
  )

  size_gnb1 <- as.numeric(
    size_gnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # FIX INVALID SIZE
  #====================================

  if(
    is.na(size_gnb1) ||
    is.nan(size_gnb1) ||
    is.infinite(size_gnb1) ||
    size_gnb1 <= 0 ||
    size_gnb1 > 10000
  ){

    size_gnb1 <- 100
  }

  #====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gnb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb1),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIMULATION
  #====================================

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb1)){

    mu_i1 <- pred_gnb1[j]

    #--------------------------------
    # FIX INVALID MU
    #--------------------------------

    if(
      is.na(mu_i1) ||
      is.nan(mu_i1) ||
      is.infinite(mu_i1) ||
      mu_i1 <= 0
    ){

      mu_i1 <- 0.001
    }

    #--------------------------------
    # SAFE SIMULATION
    #--------------------------------

    sim_gnb1[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i1,

      size = size_gnb1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID SIMULATIONS
  #====================================

  sim_gnb1[
    is.na(sim_gnb1)
  ] <- 0

  sim_gnb1[
    is.nan(sim_gnb1)
  ] <- 0

  sim_gnb1[
    is.infinite(sim_gnb1)
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_gnb1 <- apply(

    sim_gnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_gnb1 <- apply(

    sim_gnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_gnb1 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_gnb1)
  )

  upper_gnb1 <- round(
    upper_gnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gnb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_gnb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_gnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gnb1 <- mean(

    upper_gnb1 -

      lower_gnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_gnb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_gnb1,

    Lower_PI = lower_gnb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_gnb1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "GNB1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gnb1 <- rbind(

    results_gnb1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gnb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb1,

      Width = width_gnb1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gnb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gnb1,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gnb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GNB1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb1
```


```{r}
#====================================
# GNB1 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gnb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GNB1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb1
```




##80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# GNB2 : 80% SPLITS
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# FULL FIXED VERSION
#========================================


results_gnb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

  test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

  train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

  train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

  train_2$white <- factor(train_2$white)

  test_2$hmo <- factor(
    test_2$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_2$type <- factor(
    test_2$type,
    levels = levels(train_2$type)
  )

  test_2$white <- factor(
    test_2$white,
    levels = levels(train_2$white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT GNB MODEL
  #====================================

  gnb_model2 <- tryCatch(

    vglm(

      los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

      family = genpoisson2(),

      data = train_2
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if(is.null(gnb_model2)) next

  #====================================
  # SAFE PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb2 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      gnb_model2,

      newdata = test_2,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_2$los),

        nrow(test_2)
      )
    }
  )

  pred_gnb2 <- as.numeric(
    pred_gnb2
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #====================================
  # FIX LENGTH MISMATCH
  #====================================

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual2),

    length(pred_gnb2)
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_gnb2 <- pred_gnb2[
    1:min_len
  ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual2,

    pred_gnb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_gnb2 <- pred_gnb2[keep]

  pred_gnb2[
    is.na(pred_gnb2)
  ] <- mean(actual2)

  pred_gnb2[
    is.nan(pred_gnb2)
  ] <- mean(actual2)

  pred_gnb2[
    is.infinite(pred_gnb2)
  ] <- mean(actual2)

  pred_gnb2[
    pred_gnb2 <= 0
  ] <- 0.001

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_gnb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb2,

    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIZE PARAMETER
  #====================================

  size_gnb2 <- tryCatch(

    coef(gnb_model2)[1],

    error = function(e) NA
  )

  size_gnb2 <- as.numeric(
    size_gnb2
  )

  if(
    is.na(size_gnb2) ||
    is.nan(size_gnb2) ||
    is.infinite(size_gnb2) ||
    size_gnb2 <= 0 ||
    size_gnb2 > 10000
  ){

    size_gnb2 <- 100
  }

  #====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gnb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb2),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIMULATION
  #====================================

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb2)){

    mu_i2 <- pred_gnb2[j]

    if(
      is.na(mu_i2) ||
      is.nan(mu_i2) ||
      is.infinite(mu_i2) ||
      mu_i2 <= 0
    ){

      mu_i2 <- 0.001
    }

    sim_gnb2[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i2,

      size = size_gnb2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID SIMULATIONS
  #====================================

  sim_gnb2[
    is.na(sim_gnb2)
  ] <- 0

  sim_gnb2[
    is.nan(sim_gnb2)
  ] <- 0

  sim_gnb2[
    is.infinite(sim_gnb2)
  ] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PI
  #====================================

  lower_gnb2 <- apply(

    sim_gnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_gnb2 <- apply(

    sim_gnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_gnb2 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_gnb2)
  )

  upper_gnb2 <- round(
    upper_gnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gnb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_gnb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_gnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gnb2 <- mean(

    upper_gnb2 -

      lower_gnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gnb2 <- rbind(

    results_gnb2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gnb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb2,

      Width = width_gnb2
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

  Model = "GNB2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_gnb2$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_gnb2$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_gnb2$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_gnb2$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_gnb2$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_gnb2$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_gnb2$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_gnb2
```

```{r}
#====================================
# GNB2 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gnb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GNB2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb2
```


##90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# GNB3 : 90% SPLITS
# GENERALISED NEGATIVE BINOMIAL
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
# FULL FIXED VERSION
#========================================


results_gnb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GNB3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

  test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

  train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

  train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

  train_3$white<- factor(train_3$white)

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_3$died <- factor(
    test_3$died,
    levels = levels(train_3$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$white <- factor(
    test_3$white,
    levels = levels(train_3$white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT GNB MODEL
  #====================================

  gnb_model3 <- tryCatch(

    vglm(

      los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

      family = genpoisson2(),

      data = train_3
    ),

    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  #====================================
  # SKIP FAILED MODEL
  #====================================

  if(is.null(gnb_model3)) next

  #====================================
  # SAFE PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb3 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      gnb_model3,

      newdata = test_3,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_3$los),

        nrow(test_3)
      )
    }
  )

  #====================================
  # ACTUAL VALUES
  #====================================

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #====================================
  # CONVERT TO NUMERIC
  #====================================

  pred_gnb3 <- as.numeric(
    pred_gnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # REMOVE NULL PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb3 <- pred_gnb3[
    !is.na(pred_gnb3)
  ]

  #====================================
  # FORCE SAME LENGTH
  #====================================

  min_len <- min(

    length(actual3),

    length(pred_gnb3)
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  pred_gnb3 <- pred_gnb3[
    1:min_len
  ]

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual3,

    pred_gnb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_gnb3 <- pred_gnb3[keep]

  #====================================
  # FIX BAD PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_gnb3[
    is.na(pred_gnb3)
  ] <- mean(actual3)

  pred_gnb3[
    is.nan(pred_gnb3)
  ] <- mean(actual3)

  pred_gnb3[
    is.infinite(pred_gnb3)
  ] <- mean(actual3)

  pred_gnb3[
    pred_gnb3 <= 0
  ] <- 0.001

  #====================================
  # CHECK SAMPLE SIZE
  #====================================

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_gnb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gnb3,

    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIZE PARAMETER
  #====================================

  size_gnb3 <- tryCatch(

    coef(gnb_model3)[1],

    error = function(e) NA
  )

  size_gnb3 <- as.numeric(
    size_gnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # FIX INVALID SIZE
  #====================================

  if(
    is.na(size_gnb3) ||
    is.nan(size_gnb3) ||
    is.infinite(size_gnb3) ||
    size_gnb3 <= 0 ||
    size_gnb3 > 10000
  ){

    size_gnb3 <- 100
  }

  #====================================
  # SAFE SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gnb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gnb3),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE LOOP
  #====================================

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gnb3)){

    #--------------------------------
    # SAFE MU
    #--------------------------------

    mu_i3 <- pred_gnb3[j]

    if(
      is.na(mu_i3) ||
      is.nan(mu_i3) ||
      is.infinite(mu_i3) ||
      mu_i3 <= 0
    ){

      mu_i3 <- 0.001
    }

    #--------------------------------
    # SAFE SIZE
    #--------------------------------

    size_i3 <- size_gnb3

    if(
      is.na(size_i3) ||
      is.nan(size_i3) ||
      is.infinite(size_i3) ||
      size_i3 <= 0 ||
      size_i3 > 10000
    ){

      size_i3 <- 100
    }

    #--------------------------------
    # SAFE SIMULATION
    #--------------------------------

    sim_vals <- tryCatch(

      rnbinom(

        nsim,

        mu = mu_i3,

        size = size_i3
      ),

      error = function(e){

        rpois(
          nsim,
          lambda = mu_i3
        )
      },

      warning = function(w){

        rpois(
          nsim,
          lambda = mu_i3
        )
      }
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # REMOVE BAD VALUES
    #--------------------------------

    sim_vals[
      is.na(sim_vals)
    ] <- 0

    sim_vals[
      is.nan(sim_vals)
    ] <- 0

    sim_vals[
      is.infinite(sim_vals)
    ] <- 0

    sim_gnb3[j, ] <- sim_vals
  }

  #====================================
  # SAFE PI
  #====================================

  lower_gnb3 <- apply(

    sim_gnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  upper_gnb3 <- apply(

    sim_gnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975,

    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_gnb3 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_gnb3)
  )

  upper_gnb3 <- round(
    upper_gnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gnb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_gnb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_gnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gnb3 <- mean(

    upper_gnb3 -

      lower_gnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gnb3 <- rbind(

    results_gnb3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gnb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gnb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gnb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gnb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gnb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gnb3,

      Width = width_gnb3
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY
  #====================================

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gnb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gnb3,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gnb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GNB3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gnb3
```


```{r}
#====================================
# GNB3 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gnb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GNB3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gnb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gnb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gnb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gnb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gnb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

```



##generalised additive model

#70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(mgcv)


#========================================
# GAM1 : 70% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
#========================================

results_gam1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GAM1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #------------------------------------
  # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
  #------------------------------------

  train_1$white <- factor(
    train_1$white
  )

  test_1$white <- factor(
    test_1$white,
    levels = levels(train_1$white)
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT GAM MODEL
  #------------------------------------

 model_gam1 <- gam(

  los ~
    factor(hmo) +
    factor(died) +
    factor(type) +
    factor(white),

  family = nb(),

  data = train_1
)

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_gam1 <- predict(
    model_gam1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_gam1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_gam1 <- pred_gam1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_gam1 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_gam1,
    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================
theta_gadd1 <- model_gam1$family$getTheta(TRUE)
  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gam1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gam1),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gam1)){

    mu_i1 <- pred_gam1[j]

    sim_gam1[j, ] <- rnbinom(

  nsim,

  mu = mu_i1,

  size = theta_gadd1
)
  }

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_gam1 <- apply(
    sim_gam1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gam1 <- apply(
    sim_gam1,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gam1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_gam1 &
    actual1 <= upper_gam1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gam1 <- mean(

    upper_gam1 - lower_gam1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_gam1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_gam1,

    Lower_PI = lower_gam1,

    Upper_PI = upper_gam1
  )

  assign(
    paste0(
      "GAM1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gam1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gam1 <- rbind(

    results_gam1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_gam1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_gam1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_gam1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_gam1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_gam1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_gam1,

      Width = width_gam1
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_gam1, "\n")

  cat("Width :", width_gam1, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# GAM1 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gam1 <- data.frame(
```
