```{r}
  Model = "GAM1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gam1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gam1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gam1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gam1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gam1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gam1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gam1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gam1
```




##80 split
```{r}
#========================================
# GAM2 : 80% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
#========================================

results_gam2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GAM2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #------------------------------------
  # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
  #------------------------------------

  train_2$white <- factor(train_2$white)

  test_2$white <- factor(
    test_2$white,
    levels = levels(train_2$white)
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT GAM MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_gam2 <- gam(

    los ~
      factor(hmo) +
      factor(died) +
      factor(type) +
      factor(white),

    family = nb(),

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_gam2 <- predict(
    model_gam2,
    newdata = test_2,
    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_gam2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_gam2 <- pred_gam2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_gam2 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_gam2,
    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================

  theta_gadd2 <- model_gam2$family$getTheta(TRUE)

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gam2 <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(pred_gam2),
    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gam2)){

    mu_i2 <- pred_gam2[j]

    sim_gam2[j, ] <- rnbinom(
      nsim,
      mu = mu_i2,
      size = theta_gadd2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_gam2 <- apply(
    sim_gam2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gam2 <- apply(
    sim_gam2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gam2 <- mean(
    actual2 >= lower_gam2 &
      actual2 <= upper_gam2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gam2 <- mean(
    upper_gam2 - lower_gam2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gam2 <- rbind(

    results_gam2,

    data.frame(

      ME = as.numeric(acc_gam2[1,"ME"]),

      RMSE = as.numeric(acc_gam2[1,"RMSE"]),

      MAE = as.numeric(acc_gam2[1,"MAE"]),

      MPE = as.numeric(acc_gam2[1,"MPE"]),

      MAPE = as.numeric(acc_gam2[1,"MAPE"]),

      Coverage = coverage_gam2,

      Width = width_gam2
    )
  )

  cat("Coverage :", coverage_gam2, "\n")
  cat("Width :", width_gam2, "\n")
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# GAM2 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gam2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GAM2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gam2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gam2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gam2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gam2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gam2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gam2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gam2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gam2
```


##90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# GAM3 : 90% SPLITS
# SIMULATION-BASED PI
#========================================

results_gam3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GAM3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  #------------------------------------
  # MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
  #------------------------------------

  train_3$hmo   <- factor(train_3$hmo)
  train_3$died  <- factor(train_3$died)
  train_3$type  <- factor(train_3$type)
  train_3$white <- factor(train_3$white)

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_3$died <- factor(
    test_3$died,
    levels = levels(train_3$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$white <- factor(
    test_3$white,
    levels = levels(train_3$white)
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT GAM MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_gam3 <- gam(

    los ~

      factor(hmo) +

      factor(died) +

      factor(type) +

      factor(white),

    family = nb(),

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_gam3 <- predict(

    model_gam3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_gam3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_gam3 <- pred_gam3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_gam3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_gam3,

    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # SIMULATION-BASED PI
  #====================================

  theta_gadd3 <- model_gam3$family$getTheta(TRUE)

  nsim <- 1000

  sim_gam3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_gam3),

    ncol = nsim
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # GENERATE SIMULATIONS
  #------------------------------------

  for(j in 1:length(pred_gam3)){

    mu_i3 <- pred_gam3[j]

    sim_gam3[j, ] <- rnbinom(

      nsim,

      mu = mu_i3,

      size = theta_gadd3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_gam3 <- apply(
    sim_gam3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_gam3 <- apply(
    sim_gam3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_gam3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_gam3 &

      actual3 <= upper_gam3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_gam3 <- mean(

    upper_gam3 -

      lower_gam3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_gam3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_gam3,

    Lower_PI = lower_gam3,

    Upper_PI = upper_gam3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "GAM3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_gam3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_gam3 <- rbind(

    results_gam3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = as.numeric(
        acc_gam3[1,"ME"]
      ),

      RMSE = as.numeric(
        acc_gam3[1,"RMSE"]
      ),

      MAE = as.numeric(
        acc_gam3[1,"MAE"]
      ),

      MPE = as.numeric(
        acc_gam3[1,"MPE"]
      ),

      MAPE = as.numeric(
        acc_gam3[1,"MAPE"]
      ),

      Coverage = coverage_gam3,

      Width = width_gam3
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_gam3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_gam3,
    "\n"
  )
}
```



```{r}
#====================================
# GAM3 SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_gam3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "GAM3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_gam3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_gam3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_gam3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_gam3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_gam3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_gam3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_gam3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_gam3
```






## zero-truncated NB

## 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================



#========================================
# ZTNB1 : 70% SPLITS
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_ztnb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTNB1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT ZTNB MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztnb_1 <- vglm(los ~ hmo + died + type + white,
               family = posnegbinomial(),
               data = train_1)


  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------
#====================================
# ACTUAL VALUES
#====================================

actual1 <- test_1$los
 pred_ztnb1<- predict(
    ztnb_1,
    newdata = test_1,
    type = "response"
  )
#====================================
# CONVERT PREDICTIONS
#====================================

pred_ztnb1 <- as.numeric(
  pred_ztnb1
)

#====================================
# REMOVE INVALID PREDICTIONS
#====================================

pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[
  !is.na(pred_ztnb1)
]

pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[
  !is.nan(pred_ztnb1)
]

pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[
  !is.infinite(pred_ztnb1)
]

#====================================
# FORCE SAME LENGTH
#====================================

min_len <- min(

  length(actual1),

  length(pred_ztnb1)
)

actual1 <- actual1[
  1:min_len
]

pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[
  1:min_len
]

#====================================
# NOW COMPLETE.CASES WORKS
#====================================

keep <- complete.cases(

  actual1,

  pred_ztnb1
)

actual1 <- actual1[keep]

pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[keep]
 

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_ztnb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_ztnb1 <- pred_ztnb1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztnb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztnb1,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESPONSE RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_ztnb1 <- residuals(

    ztnb_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  resid_ztnb1 <- resid_ztnb1[
    is.finite(resid_ztnb1)
  ]

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  boot_ztnb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_ztnb1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #------------------------------------

  for(b in 1:B){

    #--------------------------------
    # RESAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #--------------------------------

    res_boot1 <- sample(

      resid_ztnb1,

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # RANDOM INDICES
    #--------------------------------

    idx1 <- sample(

      1:length(res_boot1),

      length(pred_ztnb1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #--------------------------------

    boot_ztnb1[, b] <-

      pred_ztnb1 +

      res_boot1[idx1]
  }

  #====================================
  # FIX INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  boot_ztnb1[boot_ztnb1 <= 0] <- 1

  boot_ztnb1 <- round(
    boot_ztnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_ztnb1 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztnb1 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_ztnb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_ztnb1 &
    actual1 <= upper_ztnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_ztnb1 <- mean(

    upper_ztnb1 - lower_ztnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztnb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_ztnb1,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztnb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztnb1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTNB1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztnb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztnb1 <- rbind(

    results_ztnb1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztnb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztnb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztnb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztnb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztnb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztnb1,

      Width = width_ztnb1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztnb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztnb1,
    "\n"
  )
}

```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztnb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTNB1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztnb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb1
```

## 80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# ZTNB2 : 80% SPLITS
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================


library(glmmTMB)
results_ztnb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTNB2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT ZTNB MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztnb_2 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    family = posnegbinomial(),

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_ztnb2 <- predict(

    ztnb_2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_ztnb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_ztnb2 <- pred_ztnb2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztnb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztnb2,

    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESPONSE RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_ztnb2 <- residuals(

    ztnb_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  resid_ztnb2 <- resid_ztnb2[
    is.finite(resid_ztnb2)
  ]

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  boot_ztnb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_ztnb2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #------------------------------------

  for(b in 1:B){

    #--------------------------------
    # RESAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #--------------------------------

    res_boot2 <- sample(

      resid_ztnb2,

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # RANDOM INDICES
    #--------------------------------

    idx2 <- sample(

      1:length(res_boot2),

      length(pred_ztnb2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #--------------------------------

    boot_ztnb2[, b] <-

      pred_ztnb2 +

      res_boot2[idx2]
  }

  #====================================
  # FIX INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  boot_ztnb2[boot_ztnb2 <= 0] <- 1

  boot_ztnb2 <- round(
    boot_ztnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_ztnb2 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztnb2 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_ztnb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_ztnb2 &
    actual2 <= upper_ztnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_ztnb2 <- mean(

    upper_ztnb2 - lower_ztnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztnb2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_ztnb2,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztnb2,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztnb2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTNB2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztnb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztnb2 <- rbind(

    results_ztnb2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztnb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztnb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztnb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztnb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztnb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztnb2,

      Width = width_ztnb2
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztnb2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztnb2,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztnb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTNB2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztnb2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb2
```

##90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# ZTNB3 : 90% SPLITS
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

library(VGAM)
library(forecast)

results_ztnb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTNB3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT ZTNB MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztnb_3 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    family = posnegbinomial(),

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_ztnb3 <- predict(

    ztnb_3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_ztnb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_ztnb3 <- pred_ztnb3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztnb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztnb3,

    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESPONSE RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_ztnb3 <- residuals(

    ztnb_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  resid_ztnb3 <- resid_ztnb3[
    is.finite(resid_ztnb3)
  ]

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  boot_ztnb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_ztnb3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #------------------------------------

  for(b in 1:B){

    #--------------------------------
    # RESAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #--------------------------------

    res_boot3 <- sample(

      resid_ztnb3,

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # RANDOM INDICES
    #--------------------------------

    idx3 <- sample(

      1:length(res_boot3),

      length(pred_ztnb3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #--------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #--------------------------------

    boot_ztnb3[, b] <-

      pred_ztnb3 +

      res_boot3[idx3]
  }

  #====================================
  # FIX INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  boot_ztnb3[boot_ztnb3 <= 0] <- 1

  boot_ztnb3 <- round(
    boot_ztnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_ztnb3 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztnb3 <- apply(

    boot_ztnb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_ztnb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_ztnb3 &
    actual3 <= upper_ztnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_ztnb3 <- mean(

    upper_ztnb3 - lower_ztnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztnb3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_ztnb3,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztnb3,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztnb3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTNB3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztnb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztnb3 <- rbind(

    results_ztnb3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztnb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztnb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztnb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztnb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztnb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztnb3,

      Width = width_ztnb3
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztnb3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztnb3,
    "\n"
  )
}

```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztnb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTNB3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztnb3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztnb3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztnb3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztnb3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztnb3
```
#graph
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

plot_data_ztnb <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(
    1:100,
    function(i){

      rbind(

        data.frame(
          Actual = get(paste0("ZTNB1_SPLIT_",i))$Actual,
          Predicted = get(paste0("ZTNB1_SPLIT_",i))$Predicted,
          Split = "70%"
        ),

        data.frame(
          Actual = get(paste0("ZTNB2_SPLIT_",i))$Actual,
          Predicted = get(paste0("ZTNB2_SPLIT_",i))$Predicted,
          Split = "80%"
        ),

        data.frame(
          Actual = get(paste0("ZTNB3_SPLIT_",i))$Actual,
          Predicted = get(paste0("ZTNB3_SPLIT_",i))$Predicted,
          Split = "90%"
        )
      )
    }
  )
)

ggplot(
  plot_data_ztnb,
  aes(
    Actual,
    Predicted,
    colour = Split
  )
) +

geom_point(
  alpha = 0.25,
  size = 1.2
) +

geom_smooth(
  method = "lm",
  se = FALSE,
  linewidth = 1.2
) +

geom_abline(
  intercept = 0,
  slope = 1,
  colour = "red",
  linewidth = 1.2,
  linetype = "dashed"
) +

facet_wrap(~Split) +

scale_colour_manual(
  values = c(
    "70%" = "blue",
    "80%" = "darkgreen",
    "90%" = "purple"
  )
) +

theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

labs(
  title = "ZTNB Model: Actual vs Predicted (100 Repeated Splits)",
  x = "Actual LOS",
  y = "Predicted LOS"
)
```


## generalised truncated poisson

## 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(VGAM)

#========================================
# ZTGP1 : 70% SPLITS
# ZERO-TRUNCATED GENERALIZED POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP + CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_ztgp1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTGP1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztgp_1 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    family = pospoisson(),

    data = train_1
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_ztgp1 <- predict(

    ztgp_1,

    newdata = test_1,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_ztgp1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_ztgp1 <- pred_ztgp1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztgp1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztgp1,

    actual1
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp1 <- (

    actual1 -

      pred_ztgp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAP SAMPLES
  #=====================================

  B <- 1000

  #=====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(actual1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_ztp1,

      length(actual1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    boot_ztp1[, b] <- (

      pred_ztgp1 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp1[boot_ztp1 <= 0] <- 1

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp1 <- apply(

    boot_ztp1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztp1 <- apply(

    boot_ztp1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp1 <- abs(

    actual1 -

      pred_ztgp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_ztp1 <- quantile(

    resid_ztp1,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp1 <- (

    pred_ztgp1 -

      qhat_ztp1
  )

  upper_ztp1 <- (

    pred_ztgp1 +

      qhat_ztp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp1 <- pmax(

    1,

    lower_ztp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_ztgp1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_ztp1 &

    actual1 <= upper_ztp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_ztgp1 <- mean(

    upper_ztp1 -

      lower_ztp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztgp1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_ztgp1,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztp1,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztp1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTGP1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztgp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztgp1 <- rbind(

    results_ztgp1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztgp1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztgp1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztgp1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztgp1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztgp1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztgp1,

      Width = width_ztgp1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztgp1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztgp1,
    "\n"
  )
}

```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztgp1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTGP1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztgp1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztgp1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztgp1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztgp1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztgp1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztgp1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztgp1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztgp1
```

## 80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# ZTGP2 : 80% SPLITS
# ZERO-TRUNCATED GENERALIZED POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP + CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_ztgp2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTGP2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztgp_2 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    family = pospoisson(),

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_ztgp2 <- predict(

    ztgp_2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_ztgp2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_ztgp2 <- pred_ztgp2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztgp2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztgp2,

    actual2
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp2 <- (

    actual2 -

      pred_ztgp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAP SAMPLES
  #=====================================

  B <- 1000

  #=====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(actual2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_ztp2,

      length(actual2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    boot_ztp2[, b] <- (

      pred_ztgp2 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp2[boot_ztp2 <= 0] <- 1

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp2 <- apply(

    boot_ztp2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztp2 <- apply(

    boot_ztp2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp2 <- abs(

    actual2 -

      pred_ztgp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_ztp2 <- quantile(

    resid_ztp2,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp2 <- (

    pred_ztgp2 -

      qhat_ztp2
  )

  upper_ztp2 <- (

    pred_ztgp2 +

      qhat_ztp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp2 <- pmax(

    1,

    lower_ztp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_ztgp2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_ztp2 &

    actual2 <= upper_ztp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_ztgp2 <- mean(

    upper_ztp2 -

      lower_ztp2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztgp2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_ztgp2,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztp2,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztp2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTGP2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztgp2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztgp2 <- rbind(

    results_ztgp2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztgp2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztgp2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztgp2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztgp2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztgp2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztgp2,

      Width = width_ztgp2
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztgp2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztgp2,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztgp2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTGP2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztgp2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztgp2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztgp2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztgp2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztgp2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztgp2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztgp2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztgp2
```

##90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# ZTGP3 : 90% SPLITS
# ZERO-TRUNCATED GENERALIZED POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP + CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

library(VGAM)
library(forecast)

results_ztgp3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("ZTGP3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

 

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  ztgp_3 <- vglm(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    family = pospoisson(),

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_ztgp3 <- predict(

    ztgp_3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_ztgp3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_ztgp3 <- pred_ztgp3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_ztgp3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_ztgp3,

    actual3
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp3 <- (

    actual3 -

      pred_ztgp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAP SAMPLES
  #=====================================

  B <- 1000

  #=====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(actual3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_ztp3,

      length(actual3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    boot_ztp3[, b] <- (

      pred_ztgp3 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  boot_ztp3[boot_ztp3 <= 0] <- 1

  #=====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp3 <- apply(

    boot_ztp3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_ztp3 <- apply(

    boot_ztp3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_ztp3 <- abs(

    actual3 -

      pred_ztgp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_ztp3 <- quantile(

    resid_ztp3,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL PI
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp3 <- (

    pred_ztgp3 -

      qhat_ztp3
  )

  upper_ztp3 <- (

    pred_ztgp3 +

      qhat_ztp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # ENSURE POSITIVE COUNTS
  #=====================================

  lower_ztp3 <- pmax(

    1,

    lower_ztp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_ztgp3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_ztp3 &

    actual3 <= upper_ztp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_ztgp3 <- mean(

    upper_ztp3 -

      lower_ztp3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_ztgp3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_ztgp3,

    Lower_PI = lower_ztp3,

    Upper_PI = upper_ztp3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "ZTGP3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_ztgp3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_ztgp3 <- rbind(

    results_ztgp3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_ztgp3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_ztgp3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_ztgp3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_ztgp3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_ztgp3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_ztgp3,

      Width = width_ztgp3
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_ztgp3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_ztgp3,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_ztgp3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "ZTGP3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_ztgp3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_ztgp3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_ztgp3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_ztgp3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_ztgp3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_ztgp3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_ztgp3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_ztgp3
```

## compoisson


```{r}
#====================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================

train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

#====================================
# MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================

train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

train_1$ white<- factor(train_1$ white)

test_1$hmo <- factor(
  test_1$hmo,
  levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
)

test_1$died <- factor(
  test_1$died,
  levels = levels(train_1$died)
)

test_1$type <- factor(
  test_1$type,
  levels = levels(train_1$type)
)

test_1$ white <- factor(
  test_1$ white,
  levels = levels(train_1$ white)
)

#====================================
# REMOVE NEW FACTOR LEVEL ROWS
#====================================

test_1 <- droplevels(test_1)

test_1 <- test_1[
  complete.cases(test_1),
]
```

```{r}
#====================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================

train_2 <- na.omit(train_2)

test_2 <- na.omit(test_2)

#====================================
# MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================

train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

train_2$ white<- factor(train_2$ white)

test_2$hmo <- factor(
  test_2$hmo,
  levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
)

test_2$died <- factor(
  test_2$died,
  levels = levels(train_2$died)
)

test_2$type <- factor(
  test_2$type,
  levels = levels(train_2$type)
)

test_2$ white <- factor(
  test_2$ white,
  levels = levels(train_2$ white)
)

#====================================
# REMOVE NEW FACTOR LEVEL ROWS
#====================================

test_2 <- droplevels(test_2)

test_2 <- test_2[
  complete.cases(test_2),
]
```

```{r}
#====================================
# REMOVE MISSING VALUES
#====================================

train_3 <- na.omit(train_3)

test_3 <- na.omit(test_3)

#====================================
# MATCH FACTOR LEVELS
#====================================

train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

train_3$ white <- factor(train_3$ white)

test_3$hmo <- factor(
  test_3$hmo,
  levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
)

test_3$died <- factor(
  test_3$died,
  levels = levels(train_3$died)
)

test_3$type <- factor(
  test_3$type,
  levels = levels(train_3$type)
)

test_3$ white<- factor(
  test_3$ white,
  levels = levels(train_3$ white)
)

#====================================
# REMOVE NEW FACTOR LEVEL ROWS
#====================================

test_3 <- droplevels(test_3)

test_3 <- test_3[
  complete.cases(test_3),
]     
```


## 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(glmmTMB)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# COMP1 : 70% SPLITS
# COM-POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_comp1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("COMP1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # REMOVE MISSING VALUES
  #====================================

  train_1 <- na.omit(train_1)

  test_1 <- na.omit(test_1)

  #====================================
  # FACTOR CONVERSION
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$ white <- factor(train_1$ white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(
    test_1$type,
    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$ white <- factor(
    test_1$ white,
    levels = levels(train_1$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT COM-POISSON MODEL
  #====================================

  comp_model1 <- glmmTMB(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    family = compois(),

    data = train_1
  )

  #====================================
  # SAFE PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_comp1 <- tryCatch(

    predict(

      comp_model1,

      newdata = test_1,

      type = "response"
    ),

    error = function(e){

      rep(

        mean(train_1$los),

        nrow(test_1)
      )
    }
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_comp1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_comp1 <- pred_comp1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_comp1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_comp1,

    actual1
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESPONSE RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  resid_comp1 <- residuals(

    comp_model1,

    type = "response"
  )

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #=====================================

  B <- 200

  #=====================================
  # FAST RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  boot_resid1 <- matrix(

    sample(

      resid_comp1,

      size = length(pred_comp1) * B,

      replace = TRUE
    ),

    nrow = length(pred_comp1),

    ncol = B
  )

  pred_matrix_comp1 <- (

    pred_comp1 +

      boot_resid1
  )

  #=====================================
  # LOWER PI
  #=====================================

  lower_comp1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  #=====================================
  # UPPER PI
  #=====================================

  upper_comp1 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #=====================================

  lower_comp1 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_comp1)
  )

  upper_comp1 <- round(
    upper_comp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_comp1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_comp1 &

    actual1 <= upper_comp1
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_comp1 <- mean(

    upper_comp1 -

      lower_comp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_comp1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_comp1,

    Lower_PI = lower_comp1,

    Upper_PI = upper_comp1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "COMP1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_comp1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_comp1 <- rbind(

    results_comp1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_comp1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_comp1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_comp1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_comp1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_comp1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_comp1,

      Width = width_comp1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_comp1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_comp1,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_comp1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "COMP1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_comp1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_comp1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_comp1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_comp1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_comp1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_comp1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_comp1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_comp1
```



## 80 split
```{r}
#========================================
# COMP2 : 80% SPLITS
# COM-POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_comp2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("COMP2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  

  #------------------------------------
  # FIT COM-POISSON MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_comp2 <- glmmTMB(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_2
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_comp2 <- predict(

    model_comp2,

    newdata = test_2,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_comp2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_comp2 <- pred_comp2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_comp2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_comp2,

    actual2
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  train_pred_comp2 <- predict(
  model_comp2,
  newdata = train_2,
  type = "response"
)

resid_comp2 <- train_2$los - train_pred_comp2

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #=====================================

  B <- 1000

  #=====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #=====================================

  pred_matrix_comp2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_comp2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(

      resid_comp2,

      size = length(pred_comp2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    pred_matrix_comp2[, b] <- (

      pred_comp2 +

        sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # LOWER PREDICTION INTERVAL
  #=====================================

  lower_comp2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  #=====================================
  # UPPER PREDICTION INTERVAL
  #=====================================

  upper_comp2 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #=====================================

  lower_comp2 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_comp2)
  )

  upper_comp2 <- round(

    upper_comp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_comp2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_comp2 &

    actual2 <= upper_comp2
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_comp2 <- mean(

    upper_comp2 -

      lower_comp2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_comp2 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual2,

    Predicted = pred_comp2,

    Lower_PI = lower_comp2,

    Upper_PI = upper_comp2
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "COMP2_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_comp2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_comp2 <- rbind(

    results_comp2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_comp2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_comp2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_comp2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_comp2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_comp2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_comp2,

      Width = width_comp2
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_comp2,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_comp2,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_comp2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "COMP2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_comp2$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_comp2$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_comp2$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_comp2$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_comp2$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_comp2$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_comp2$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_comp2
```

## 90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# COMP3 : 90% SPLITS
# COM-POISSON
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================


results_comp3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("COMP3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #------------------------------------
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #------------------------------------

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  
  #------------------------------------
  # FIT COM-POISSON MODEL
  #------------------------------------

  model_comp3 <- glmmTMB(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = train_3
  )

  #------------------------------------
  # PREDICTIONS
  #------------------------------------

  pred_comp3 <- predict(

    model_comp3,

    newdata = test_3,

    type = "response"
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #------------------------------------
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #------------------------------------

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_comp3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_comp3 <- pred_comp3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #------------------------------------
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #------------------------------------

  acc_comp3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_comp3,

    actual3
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  train_pred_comp3 <- predict(
  model_comp3,
  newdata = train_3,
  type = "response"
)

resid_comp3 <- train_3$los - train_pred_comp3

  #=====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #=====================================

  B <- 1000

  #=====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #=====================================

  pred_matrix_comp3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_comp3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #=====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #=====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(

      resid_comp3,

      size = length(pred_comp3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    pred_matrix_comp3[, b] <- (

      pred_comp3 +

        sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #=====================================
  # LOWER PREDICTION INTERVAL
  #=====================================

  lower_comp3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  #=====================================
  # UPPER PREDICTION INTERVAL
  #=====================================

  upper_comp3 <- apply(

    pred_matrix_comp3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #=====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #=====================================

  lower_comp3 <- pmax(

    0,

    round(lower_comp3)
  )

  upper_comp3 <- round(

    upper_comp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_comp3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_comp3 &

    actual3 <= upper_comp3
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_comp3 <- mean(

    upper_comp3 -

      lower_comp3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_comp3 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual3,

    Predicted = pred_comp3,

    Lower_PI = lower_comp3,

    Upper_PI = upper_comp3
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "COMP3_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_comp3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_comp3 <- rbind(

    results_comp3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_comp3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_comp3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_comp3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_comp3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_comp3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_comp3,

      Width = width_comp3
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_comp3,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_comp3,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_comp3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "COMP3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_comp3$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_comp3$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_comp3$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_comp3$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_comp3$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_comp3$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_comp3$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_comp3
```

##descrete- weibull

## 70 split

```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(Metrics)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# DW1 : 70% SPLITS
# DISCRETE WEIBULL
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_dw1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("DW1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # CONVERT RESPONSE TO NUMERIC
  #====================================

  train_1$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(train_1$los)
  )

  test_1$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(test_1$los)
  )

  #====================================
  # FACTOR CONVERSION
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$ white <- factor(train_1$ white)

  #====================================
  # MATCH TEST FACTOR LEVELS
  #====================================

  test_1$hmo <- factor(

    test_1$hmo,

    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(

    test_1$died,

    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(

    test_1$type,

    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$ white <- factor(

    test_1$ white,

    levels = levels(train_1$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # DESIGN MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_1
  )

  X_test1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = test_1
  )

  y_train1 <- train_1$los

  y_test1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
  #====================================

  dw_loglik1 <- function(

    par,
    y1,
    X1

  ){

    p1 <- ncol(X1)

    gamma1 <- par[1:p1]

    logit_q1 <- par[p1 + 1]

    beta1 <- 1

    eta1 <- X1 %*% gamma1

    q1 <- exp(logit_q1) /

      (1 + exp(logit_q1))

    q1 <- pmin(

      pmax(q1, 1e-6),

      1 - 1e-6
    )

    pmf1 <- (

      q1^(y1^beta1) -

        q1^((y1 + 1)^beta1)

    )

    pmf1 <- pmax(

      pmf1,

      1e-10
    )

    loglik1 <- sum(

      log(pmf1)
    )

    return(-loglik1)
  }

  #====================================
  # INITIAL VALUES
  #====================================

  init1 <- c(

    rep(
      0,
      ncol(X_train1)
    ),

    0
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  fit_dw1 <- optim(

    par = init1,

    fn = dw_loglik1,

    y1 = y_train1,

    X1 = X_train1,

    method = "BFGS",

    control = list(
      maxit = 200
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETER ESTIMATES
  #====================================

  gamma_hat1 <- fit_dw1$par[
    1:ncol(X_train1)
  ]

  logit_q_hat1 <- fit_dw1$par[
    ncol(X_train1) + 1
  ]

  q_hat1 <- exp(logit_q_hat1) /

    (1 + exp(logit_q_hat1))

  beta_hat1 <- 1

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  eta_test1 <- X_test1 %*%
    gamma_hat1

  pred_dw1 <- as.numeric(

    (
      q_hat1 /
        (1 - q_hat1)
    )^(1 / beta_hat1)

  )

  pred_dw1 <- rep(

    pred_dw1,

    nrow(test_1)
  )

  actual1 <- y_test1
#====================================
# AIC AND BIC
#====================================

k_dw1 <- length(
  fit_dw1$par
)

logLik_dw1 <- -fit_dw1$value

n_dw1 <- nrow(
  train_1
)

aic_dw1 <- -2 * logLik_dw1 +
  2 * k_dw1

bic_dw1 <- -2 * logLik_dw1 +
  log(n_dw1) * k_dw1
  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(

    actual1,
    pred_dw1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_dw1 <- pred_dw1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_dw1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_dw1,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_dw1 <- y_train1 -

    mean(y_train1)

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 500

  boot_dw1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_dw1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid1 <- sample(

      resid_dw1,

      length(pred_dw1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_dw1[, b] <- (

      pred_dw1 +

        sampled_resid1
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_dw1[boot_dw1 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_dw1 <- apply(

    boot_dw1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_dw1 <- apply(

    boot_dw1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_dw1 <- round(
    lower_dw1
  )

  upper_dw1 <- round(
    upper_dw1
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_dw1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_dw1 &

    actual1 <= upper_dw1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_dw1 <- mean(

    upper_dw1 -

      lower_dw1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_dw1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_dw1,

    Lower_PI = lower_dw1,

    Upper_PI = upper_dw1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "DW1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_dw1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

 results_dw1 <- rbind(

  results_dw1,

  data.frame(

    Split = i,

    AIC = as.numeric(aic_dw1),

    BIC = as.numeric(bic_dw1),

    ME = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"ME"]),

    RMSE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"RMSE"]),

    MAE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAE"]),

    MPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MPE"]),

    MAPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAPE"]),

    Coverage = as.numeric(coverage_dw1),

    Width = as.numeric(width_dw1)
  )
)

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_dw1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_dw1,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_dw1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "DW1",

  Split = "70%",
   Mean_AIC = mean(
    results_dw1$AIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_BIC = mean(
    results_dw1$BIC,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),


  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_dw1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_dw1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_dw1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_dw1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_dw1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_dw1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_dw1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_dw1
```

## 80 split
```{r}
#========================================
# DW2 : 80% SPLITS
# DISCRETE WEIBULL
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_dw2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("DW2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # CONVERT RESPONSE TO NUMERIC
  #====================================

  train_2$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(train_2$los)
  )

  test_2$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(test_2$los)
  )

  #====================================
  # FACTOR CONVERSION
  #====================================

  train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

  train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

  train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

  train_2$ white <- factor(train_2$ white)

  #====================================
  # MATCH TEST FACTOR LEVELS
  #====================================

  test_2$hmo <- factor(
    test_2$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_2$type <- factor(
    test_2$type,
    levels = levels(train_2$type)
  )

  test_2$ white<- factor(
    test_2$ white,
    levels = levels(train_2$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # DESIGN MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train2 <- model.matrix(
    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,
    data = train_2
  )

  X_test2 <- model.matrix(
    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,
    data = test_2
  )

  y_train2 <- train_2$los

  y_test2 <- test_2$los

  #====================================
  # DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
  #====================================

  dw_loglik2 <- function(par,y2,X2){

    p2 <- ncol(X2)

    gamma2 <- par[1:p2]

    logit_q2 <- par[p2 + 1]

    beta2 <- 1

    eta2 <- X2 %*% gamma2

    q2 <- exp(logit_q2) /
      (1 + exp(logit_q2))

    q2 <- pmin(
      pmax(q2,1e-6),
      1 - 1e-6
    )

    pmf2 <- (
      q2^(y2^beta2) -
      q2^((y2 + 1)^beta2)
    )

    pmf2 <- pmax(
      pmf2,
      1e-10
    )

    loglik2 <- sum(log(pmf2))

    return(-loglik2)
  }

  #====================================
  # INITIAL VALUES
  #====================================

  init2 <- c(
    rep(0,ncol(X_train2)),
    0
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  fit_dw2 <- optim(

    par = init2,

    fn = dw_loglik2,

    y2 = y_train2,

    X2 = X_train2,

    method = "BFGS",

    control = list(maxit = 200)
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETER ESTIMATES
  #====================================

  gamma_hat2 <- fit_dw2$par[
    1:ncol(X_train2)
  ]

  logit_q_hat2 <- fit_dw2$par[
    ncol(X_train2) + 1
  ]

  q_hat2 <- exp(logit_q_hat2) /
    (1 + exp(logit_q_hat2))

  beta_hat2 <- 1

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_dw2 <- as.numeric(
    (
      q_hat2 /
      (1 - q_hat2)
    )^(1 / beta_hat2)
  )

  pred_dw2 <- rep(
    pred_dw2,
    nrow(test_2)
  )

  actual2 <- y_test2
k_dw2 <- length(fit_dw2$par)
logLik_dw2 <- -fit_dw2$value
n_dw2 <- nrow(train_2)

aic_dw2 <- -2 * logLik_dw2 + 2 * k_dw2
bic_dw2 <- -2 * logLik_dw2 + log(n_dw2) * k_dw2
  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_dw2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_dw2 <- pred_dw2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_dw2 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_dw2,
    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_dw2 <- y_train2 -
    mean(y_train2)

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 500

  boot_dw2 <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(pred_dw2),
    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid2 <- sample(
      resid_dw2,
      length(pred_dw2),
      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_dw2[, b] <- (
      pred_dw2 +
      sampled_resid2
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_dw2[boot_dw2 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_dw2 <- apply(
    boot_dw2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_dw2 <- apply(
    boot_dw2,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_dw2 <- round(lower_dw2)

  upper_dw2 <- round(upper_dw2)

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_dw2 <- mean(
```
