```{r}
    actual2 >= lower_dw2 &
    actual2 <= upper_dw2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_dw2 <- mean(
    upper_dw2 - lower_dw2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_dw2 <- rbind(

  results_dw2,

  data.frame(

    Split = i,

    AIC = as.numeric(aic_dw2),

    BIC = as.numeric(bic_dw2),

    ME = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"ME"]),

    RMSE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"RMSE"]),

    MAE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAE"]),

    MPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MPE"]),

    MAPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAPE"]),

    Coverage = as.numeric(coverage_dw1),

    Width = as.numeric(width_dw1)
  )
)
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_dw2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "DW2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_dw2$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_dw2$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_dw2$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_dw2$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_dw2$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_dw2$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_dw2$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_dw2
```


## 90 split

```{r}
#========================================
# DW3 : 90% SPLITS
# DISCRETE WEIBULL
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_dw3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("DW3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # CONVERT RESPONSE TO NUMERIC
  #====================================

  train_3$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(train_3$los)
  )

  test_3$los <- as.numeric(
    as.character(test_3$los)
  )

  #====================================
  # FACTOR CONVERSION
  #====================================

  train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

  train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

  train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

  train_3$ white <- factor(train_3$ white)

  #====================================
  # MATCH TEST FACTOR LEVELS
  #====================================

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_3$died <- factor(
    test_3$died,
    levels = levels(train_3$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$ white<- factor(
    test_3$ white,
    levels = levels(train_3$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # DESIGN MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train3 <- model.matrix(
    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,
    data = train_3
  )

  X_test3 <- model.matrix(
    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,
    data = test_3
  )

  y_train3 <- train_3$los

  y_test3 <- test_3$los

  #====================================
  # DISCRETE WEIBULL LOG-LIKELIHOOD
  #====================================

  dw_loglik3 <- function(par,y3,X3){

    p3 <- ncol(X3)

    gamma3 <- par[1:p3]

    logit_q3 <- par[p3 + 1]

    beta3 <- 1

    eta3 <- X3 %*% gamma3

    q3 <- exp(logit_q3) /
      (1 + exp(logit_q3))

    q3 <- pmin(
      pmax(q3,1e-6),
      1 - 1e-6
    )

    pmf3 <- (
      q3^(y3^beta3) -
      q3^((y3 + 1)^beta3)
    )

    pmf3 <- pmax(
      pmf3,
      1e-10
    )

    loglik3 <- sum(log(pmf3))

    return(-loglik3)
  }

  #====================================
  # INITIAL VALUES
  #====================================

  init3 <- c(
    rep(0,ncol(X_train3)),
    0
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  fit_dw3 <- optim(

    par = init3,

    fn = dw_loglik3,

    y3 = y_train3,

    X3 = X_train3,

    method = "BFGS",

    control = list(maxit = 200)
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETER ESTIMATES
  #====================================

  gamma_hat3 <- fit_dw3$par[
    1:ncol(X_train3)
  ]

  logit_q_hat3 <- fit_dw3$par[
    ncol(X_train3) + 1
  ]

  q_hat3 <- exp(logit_q_hat3) /
    (1 + exp(logit_q_hat3))

  beta_hat3 <- 1

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_dw3 <- as.numeric(
    (
      q_hat3 /
      (1 - q_hat3)
    )^(1 / beta_hat3)
  )

  pred_dw3 <- rep(
    pred_dw3,
    nrow(test_3)
  )

  actual3 <- y_test3
k_dw3 <- length(fit_dw3$par)
logLik_dw3 <- -fit_dw3$value
n_dw3 <- nrow(train_3)

aic_dw3 <- -2 * logLik_dw3 + 2 * k_dw3
bic_dw3 <- -2 * logLik_dw3 + log(n_dw3) * k_dw3
  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_dw3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_dw3 <- pred_dw3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_dw3 <- forecast::accuracy(
    pred_dw3,
    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_dw3 <- y_train3 -
    mean(y_train3)

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
  #====================================

  B <- 500

  boot_dw3 <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(pred_dw3),
    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # BOOTSTRAP LOOP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    sampled_resid3 <- sample(
      resid_dw3,
      length(pred_dw3),
      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_dw3[, b] <- (
      pred_dw3 +
      sampled_resid3
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_dw3[boot_dw3 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_dw3 <- apply(
    boot_dw3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_dw3 <- apply(
    boot_dw3,
    1,
    quantile,
    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # ROUNDING
  #====================================

  lower_dw3 <- round(lower_dw3)

  upper_dw3 <- round(upper_dw3)

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_dw3 <- mean(
    actual3 >= lower_dw3 &
    actual3 <= upper_dw3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_dw3 <- mean(
    upper_dw3 - lower_dw3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_dw3 <- rbind(

  results_dw3,

  data.frame(

    Split = i,

    AIC = as.numeric(aic_dw3),

    BIC = as.numeric(bic_dw3),

    ME = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"ME"]),

    RMSE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"RMSE"]),

    MAE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAE"]),

    MPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MPE"]),

    MAPE = as.numeric(acc_dw1[1,"MAPE"]),

    Coverage = as.numeric(coverage_dw1),

    Width = as.numeric(width_dw1)
  )
)
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_dw3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "DW3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_dw3$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_dw3$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_dw3$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_dw3$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_dw3$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_dw3$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_dw3$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_dw3
```
#GLM COMPARISON
```{r}
#========================================================
# COUNT REGRESSION MODEL COMPARISON
# 70:30 SPLIT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#========================================================
# COMBINE ALL MODEL SUMMARIES
#========================================================

compare_70 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Quasi-Poisson",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "GAM",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "Discrete Weibull"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nb1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gp1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gam1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_comp1$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_dw1$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nb1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gp1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gam1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_comp1$Mean_MAE,
    summary_dw1$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_ME,
    summary_nb1$Mean_ME,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_ME,
    summary_gp1$Mean_ME,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_ME,
    summary_gam1$Mean_ME,
    summary_comp1$Mean_ME,
    summary_dw1$Mean_ME
  ),

  MAPE = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_nb1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gp1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gam1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_comp1$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_dw1$Mean_MAPE
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nb1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gp1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gam1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_comp1$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_dw1$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_pois$Mean_Width,
    summary_nb1$Mean_Width,
    summary_quasi1$Mean_Width,
    summary_gp1$Mean_Width,
    summary_gnb1$Mean_Width,
    summary_gam1$Mean_Width,
    summary_comp1$Mean_Width,
    summary_dw1$Mean_Width
  )
)

compare_70
#========================================================
# CREATE RANKS
#========================================================

compare_70$RMSE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_70$RMSE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_70$MAE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_70$MAE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_70$ME_Rank <- rank(
  abs(compare_70$ME),
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_70$MAPE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_70$MAPE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_70$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
  -compare_70$Coverage,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_70$Width_Rank <- rank(
  compare_70$Width,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

compare_70$Overall_Score <-

  compare_70$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_70$MAE_Rank +

  compare_70$MAPE_Rank +

  compare_70$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_70$Width_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

compare_70$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  compare_70$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT
#========================================================

compare_70 <- compare_70[
  order(compare_70$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_70) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

compare_70_final <- compare_70[,c(

  "Overall_Rank",

  "Model",

  "RMSE",
  "RMSE_Rank",

  "MAE",
  "MAE_Rank",

  "ME",
  "ME_Rank",

  "MAPE",
  "MAPE_Rank",

  "Coverage",
  "Coverage_Rank",

  "Width",
  "Width_Rank"

)]

compare_70_final
#========================================================
# EXPORT TO OVERLEAF
#========================================================

latex_table <- kable(

  compare_70_final,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 70:30 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:compare70"

)

writeLines(

  latex_table,

  "compare_70_medpar.tex"

)

#========================================================
# DISPLAY TABLE
#========================================================

kable(

  compare_70_final,

  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 70:30 Train--Test Split",

  align = "c"

) %>%

  kable_styling(

    full_width = FALSE,

    bootstrap_options = c(

      "striped",

      "hover",

      "condensed"

    )

  )

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_70_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{compare_70_medpar.tex}\n"
)

```

#A
```{r}
AIC_BIC_70 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "generalised-additive model",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "descrete-weibull"
  ),

  AIC = c(
    AIC(model_pois),
    AIC(model_nb1),
    AIC(model_gp1),
    AIC(gnb_model1),
    AIC(model_gam1),
    AIC(comp_model1),
    aic_dw1
  ),

  BIC = c(
    BIC(model_pois),
    BIC(model_nb1),
    BIC(model_gp1),
    BIC(gnb_model1),
    BIC(model_gam1),
    BIC(comp_model1),
    bic_dw1
  )
)
AIC_BIC_70
#========================================================
# AIC-BIC MODEL COMPARISON
# 70:30 SPLIT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#========================================================
# RANKS
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70$AIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_70$AIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

AIC_BIC_70$BIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_70$BIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70$Overall_Score <-

  AIC_BIC_70$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_70$BIC_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_70$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70 <- AIC_BIC_70[
  order(AIC_BIC_70$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(AIC_BIC_70) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70_Final <- AIC_BIC_70[,c(

  "Overall_Rank",

  "Model",

  "AIC",
  "AIC_Rank",

  "BIC",
  "BIC_Rank"

)]

#========================================================
# VIEW TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_70_Final

kable(
  AIC_BIC_70_Final,
  caption = "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (70:30 Split)",
  align = "c"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    )
  )
latex_aic70 <- kable(
  AIC_BIC_70_Final,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "c",
  caption = "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (70:30 Split)"
)

writeLines(
  latex_aic70,
  "AIC_BIC_70_medpar.tex"
)

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "AIC_BIC_70_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload this file to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{AIC_BIC_70_medpar.tex}\n"
)
```
#80
```{r}
#========================================================
# COMBINE ALL MODEL SUMMARIES
#========================================================

compare_80 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Quasi-Poisson",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "GAM",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "Discrete Weibull"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nb2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gp2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gam2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_comp2$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_dw2$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nb2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gp2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gam2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_comp2$Mean_MAE,
    summary_dw2$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_ME,
    summary_nb2$Mean_ME,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_ME,
    summary_gp2$Mean_ME,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_ME,
    summary_gam2$Mean_ME,
    summary_comp2$Mean_ME,
    summary_dw2$Mean_ME
  ),

  MAPE = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_nb2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gp2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gam2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_comp2$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_dw2$Mean_MAPE
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nb2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gp2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gam2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_comp2$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_dw2$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_pois80$Mean_Width,
    summary_nb2$Mean_Width,
    summary_quasi2$Mean_Width,
    summary_gp2$Mean_Width,
    summary_gnb2$Mean_Width,
    summary_gam2$Mean_Width,
    summary_comp2$Mean_Width,
    summary_dw2$Mean_Width
  )
)

#========================================================
# CREATE RANKS
#========================================================

compare_80$RMSE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$RMSE)
compare_80$MAE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$MAE)
compare_80$ME_Rank <- rank(abs(compare_80$ME))
compare_80$MAPE_Rank <- rank(compare_80$MAPE)
compare_80$Coverage_Rank <- rank(-compare_80$Coverage)
compare_80$Width_Rank <- rank(compare_80$Width)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

compare_80$Overall_Score <-
  compare_80$RMSE_Rank +
  compare_80$MAE_Rank +
  compare_80$MAPE_Rank +
  compare_80$Coverage_Rank +
  compare_80$Width_Rank

compare_80$Overall_Rank <- rank(compare_80$Overall_Score)

compare_80 <- compare_80[
  order(compare_80$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_80) <- NULL

compare_80_final <- compare_80[,c(
  "Overall_Rank",
  "Model",
  "RMSE","RMSE_Rank",
  "MAE","MAE_Rank",
  "ME","ME_Rank",
  "MAPE","MAPE_Rank",
  "Coverage","Coverage_Rank",
  "Width","Width_Rank"
)]

compare_80_final
latex_table80 <- kable(
  compare_80_final,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "c",
  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 80:20 Train--Test Split",
  label = "tab:compare80"
)

writeLines(
  latex_table80,
  "compare_80_medpar.tex"
)
cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_80_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload this file to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{compare_80_medpar.tex}\n"
)

print(compare_80_final)
```

```{r}
AIC_BIC_80 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "Generalized Additive Model",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "Discrete Weibull"
  ),

  AIC = c(
    AIC(model_pois80),
    AIC(model_nb2),
    AIC(model_gp2),
    AIC(gnb_model2),
    AIC(model_gam2),
    AIC(model_comp2),
    aic_dw2
  ),

  BIC = c(
    BIC(model_pois80),
    BIC(model_nb2),
    BIC(model_gp2),
    BIC(gnb_model2),
    BIC(model_gam2),
    BIC(model_comp2),
    bic_dw2
  )
)

#========================================================
# AIC-BIC MODEL COMPARISON
# 80:20 SPLIT
#========================================================


#========================================================
# CREATE RANKS
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80$AIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_80$AIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

AIC_BIC_80$BIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_80$BIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80$Overall_Score <-

  AIC_BIC_80$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_80$BIC_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_80$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80 <- AIC_BIC_80[
  order(AIC_BIC_80$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(AIC_BIC_80) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80_Final <- AIC_BIC_80[, c(

  "Overall_Rank",

  "Model",

  "AIC",
  "AIC_Rank",

  "BIC",
  "BIC_Rank"

)]

#========================================================
# DISPLAY FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_80_Final

#========================================================
# NICE TABLE FOR REPORT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

kable(

  AIC_BIC_80_Final,

  caption =
    "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (80:20 Split)",

  align = "c",

  digits = 3

) %>%

  kable_styling(

    full_width = FALSE,

    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    )

  )

library(knitr)

#========================================
# 80% SPLIT TABLE
#========================================

latex_aic80 <- kable(

  AIC_BIC_80_Final,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  digits = 3,

  caption = "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (80:20 Split)",

  label = "tab:aicbic80"

)

writeLines(
  latex_aic80,
  "AIC_BIC_80_medpar.tex"
)
cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "AIC_BIC_80_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload this file to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{AIC_BIC_80_medpar.tex}\n"
)
```
#90
```{r}
#========================================================
# COMBINE ALL MODEL SUMMARIES
#========================================================

compare_90 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Quasi-Poisson",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "GAM",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "Discrete Weibull"
  ),

  RMSE = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_nb3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gp3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_gam3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_comp3$Mean_RMSE,
    summary_dw3$Mean_RMSE
  ),

  MAE = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_MAE,
    summary_nb3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gp3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_gam3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_comp3$Mean_MAE,
    summary_dw3$Mean_MAE
  ),

  ME = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_ME,
    summary_nb3$Mean_ME,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_ME,
    summary_gp3$Mean_ME,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_ME,
    summary_gam3$Mean_ME,
    summary_comp3$Mean_ME,
    summary_dw3$Mean_ME
  ),

  MAPE = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_nb3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gp3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_gam3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_comp3$Mean_MAPE,
    summary_dw3$Mean_MAPE
  ),

  Coverage = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_nb3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gp3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_gam3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_comp3$Mean_Coverage,
    summary_dw3$Mean_Coverage
  ),

  Width = c(
    summary_pois90$Mean_Width,
    summary_nb3$Mean_Width,
    summary_quasi3$Mean_Width,
    summary_gp3$Mean_Width,
    summary_gnb3$Mean_Width,
    summary_gam3$Mean_Width,
    summary_comp3$Mean_Width,
    summary_dw3$Mean_Width
  )
)

#========================================================
# CREATE RANKS
#========================================================

compare_90$RMSE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_90$RMSE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_90$MAE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_90$MAE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_90$ME_Rank <- rank(
  abs(compare_90$ME),
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_90$MAPE_Rank <- rank(
  compare_90$MAPE,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_90$Coverage_Rank <- rank(
  -compare_90$Coverage,
  ties.method = "min"
)

compare_90$Width_Rank <- rank(
  compare_90$Width,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

compare_90$Overall_Score <-

  compare_90$RMSE_Rank +

  compare_90$MAE_Rank +

  compare_90$MAPE_Rank +

  compare_90$Coverage_Rank +

  compare_90$Width_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

compare_90$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  compare_90$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT
#========================================================

compare_90 <- compare_90[
  order(compare_90$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(compare_90) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

compare_90_final <- compare_90[,c(

  "Overall_Rank",

  "Model",

  "RMSE",
  "RMSE_Rank",

  "MAE",
  "MAE_Rank",

  "ME",
  "ME_Rank",

  "MAPE",
  "MAPE_Rank",

  "Coverage",
  "Coverage_Rank",

  "Width",
  "Width_Rank"

)]

compare_90_final


latex_table90 <- kable(

  compare_90_final,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",

  label = "tab:compare90"

)

writeLines(

  latex_table90,

  "compare_90_medpar.tex"

)

kable(
  compare_90_final,
  caption = "Comparison of Count Regression Models under the 90:10 Train--Test Split",
  align = "c"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    )
  )

cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "compare_90_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{compare_90_medpar.tex}\n"
)

print(compare_90_final)
```


```{r}
#========================================================
# AIC-BIC TABLE
# 90:10 SPLIT
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90 <- data.frame(

  Model = c(
    "Poisson",
    "Negative Binomial",
    "Generalized Poisson",
    "Generalized NB",
    "Generalized Additive Model",
    "COM-Poisson",
    "Discrete Weibull"
  ),

  AIC = c(
    AIC(model_pois90),
    AIC(model_nb3),
    AIC(model_gp3),
    AIC(gnb_model3),
    AIC(model_gam3),
    AIC( model_comp3 ),
    aic_dw3
  ),

  BIC = c(
    BIC(model_pois90),
    BIC(model_nb3),
    BIC(model_gp3),
    BIC(gnb_model3),
    BIC(model_gam3),
    BIC( model_comp3 ),
    bic_dw3
  )
)

#========================================================
# AIC-BIC MODEL COMPARISON
# 90:10 SPLIT
#========================================================



#========================================================
# CREATE RANKS
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90$AIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_90$AIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

AIC_BIC_90$BIC_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_90$BIC,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# OVERALL SCORE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90$Overall_Score <-

  AIC_BIC_90$AIC_Rank +

  AIC_BIC_90$BIC_Rank

#========================================================
# OVERALL RANK
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90$Overall_Rank <- rank(
  AIC_BIC_90$Overall_Score,
  ties.method = "min"
)

#========================================================
# SORT TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90 <- AIC_BIC_90[
  order(AIC_BIC_90$Overall_Rank),
]

rownames(AIC_BIC_90) <- NULL

#========================================================
# FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90_Final <- AIC_BIC_90[, c(

  "Overall_Rank",

  "Model",

  "AIC",
  "AIC_Rank",

  "BIC",
  "BIC_Rank"

)]

#========================================================
# DISPLAY FINAL TABLE
#========================================================

AIC_BIC_90_Final
print(AIC_BIC_90_Final)
#========================================================
# NICE TABLE FOR REPORT
#========================================================

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

kable(

  AIC_BIC_90_Final,

  caption =
    "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (90:10 Split)",

  align = "c",

  digits = 3

) %>%

  kable_styling(

    full_width = FALSE,

    bootstrap_options = c(
      "striped",
      "hover",
      "condensed"
    )

  )
latex_aic90 <- kable(

  AIC_BIC_90_Final,

  format = "latex",

  booktabs = TRUE,

  align = "c",

  digits = 3,

  caption = "Model Selection Criteria Based on AIC and BIC (90:10 Split)",

  label = "tab:aicbic90"

)

writeLines(
  latex_aic90,
  "AIC_BIC_90_medpar.tex"
)
cat(
  "\nTable exported successfully as:\n",
  "AIC_BIC_90_medpar.tex\n",
  "Upload to Overleaf and use:\n",
  "\\input{AIC_BIC_90_medpar.tex}\n"
)
getwd()
```


###MACHINE LEARNING MODELS
## random forest

```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(randomForest)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# RF1 : 70% SPLITS
# RANDOM FOREST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_rf1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(
    train_1$hmo
  )

  train_1$died <- factor(
    train_1$died
  )

  train_1$type <- factor(
    train_1$type
  )
train_1$white <- factor(train_1$white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(
    test_1$type,
    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$ white <- factor(
    test_1$ white,
    levels = levels(train_1$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT RANDOM FOREST MODEL
  #====================================

  model_rf1 <- randomForest(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_1,

    ntree = 500
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_rf1 <- predict(

    model_rf1,

    newdata = test_1
  )

  actual1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_rf1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_rf1 <- pred_rf1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_rf1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_rf1,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_rf1 <- (

    actual1 -

      pred_rf1
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_rf1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_rf1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_rf1,

      length(pred_rf1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    boot_rf1[, b] <- (

      pred_rf1 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_rf1[boot_rf1 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_rf1 <- apply(

    boot_rf1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_rf1 <- apply(

    boot_rf1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_rf1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_rf1 &

    actual1 <= upper_rf1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_rf1 <- mean(

    upper_rf1 -

      lower_rf1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_rf1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_rf1,

    Lower_PI = lower_rf1,

    Upper_PI = upper_rf1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "RF1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_rf1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_rf1 <- rbind(

    results_rf1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_rf1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_rf1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_rf1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_rf1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_rf1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_rf1,

      Width = width_rf1
    )
  )

  #====================================
  # DISPLAY RESULTS
  #====================================

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_rf1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_rf1,
    "\n"
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_rf1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "RF1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_rf1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_rf1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_rf1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_rf1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_rf1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_rf1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_rf1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_rf1
```

##80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# RF2 : 80% SPLITS
# RANDOM FOREST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

library(randomForest)
library(forecast)

results_rf2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

  train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

  train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

  train_2$ white <- factor(train_2$ white)

  test_2$hmo <- factor(
    test_2$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_2$type <- factor(
    test_2$type,
    levels = levels(train_2$type)
  )

  test_2$ white <- factor(
    test_2$ white,
    levels = levels(train_2$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT RANDOM FOREST MODEL
  #====================================

  model_rf2 <- randomForest(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_2,

    ntree = 500
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_rf2 <- predict(

    model_rf2,

    newdata = test_2
  )

  actual2 <- test_2$los

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_rf2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_rf2 <- pred_rf2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_rf2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_rf2,

    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_rf2 <- (

    actual2 -

      pred_rf2
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_rf2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_rf2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_rf2,

      length(pred_rf2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_rf2[, b] <- (

      pred_rf2 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_rf2[boot_rf2 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_rf2 <- apply(

    boot_rf2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_rf2 <- apply(

    boot_rf2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_rf2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_rf2 &

    actual2 <= upper_rf2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_rf2 <- mean(

    upper_rf2 -

      lower_rf2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_rf2 <- rbind(

    results_rf2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_rf2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_rf2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_rf2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_rf2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_rf2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_rf2,

      Width = width_rf2
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_rf2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "RF2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_rf2$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_rf2$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_rf2$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_rf2$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_rf2$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf2$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_rf2$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_rf2
```

## 90 split
```{r}
#========================================
# RF3 : 90% SPLITS
# RANDOM FOREST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

library(randomForest)
library(forecast)

results_rf3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("RF3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

  train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

  train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

  train_3$white <- factor(train_3$white)

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_3$died <- factor(
    test_3$died,
    levels = levels(train_3$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$ white <- factor(
    test_3$ white,
    levels = levels(train_3$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT RANDOM FOREST MODEL
  #====================================

  model_rf3 <- randomForest(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = train_3,

    ntree = 500
  )

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_rf3 <- predict(

    model_rf3,

    newdata = test_3
  )

  actual3 <- test_3$los

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_rf3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_rf3 <- pred_rf3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_rf3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_rf3,

    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_rf3 <- (

    actual3 -

      pred_rf3
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_rf3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_rf3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_rf3,

      length(pred_rf3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_rf3[, b] <- (

      pred_rf3 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_rf3[boot_rf3 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_rf3 <- apply(

    boot_rf3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_rf3 <- apply(

    boot_rf3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_rf3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_rf3 &

    actual3 <= upper_rf3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_rf3 <- mean(

    upper_rf3 -

      lower_rf3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_rf3 <- rbind(

    results_rf3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_rf3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_rf3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_rf3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_rf3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_rf3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_rf3,

      Width = width_rf3
    )
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_rf3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "RF3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_rf3$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_rf3$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_rf3$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_rf3$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_rf3$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_rf3$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_rf3$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_rf3
```

##XGboost
# 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# XGB1 : 70% SPLITS
# XGBOOST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_xgb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGB1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$ white<- factor(train_1$ white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(
    test_1$type,
    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$ white <- factor(
    test_1$ white,
    levels = levels(train_1$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  x_train1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +white,

    data = train_1
  )[,-1]

  x_test1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = test_1
  )[,-1]

  y_train1 <- train_1$los

  y_test1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # D MATRIX
  #====================================

  dtrain1 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_train1,

    label = y_train1
  )

  dtest1 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_test1
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT XGBOOST MODEL
  #====================================

 model_xgb1 <- xgboost(

  x = x_train1,

  y = y_train1,

  objective = "reg:squarederror",

  nrounds = 100,

  max_depth = 6,

  learning_rate = 0.1
)

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_xgb1 <- predict(
  model_xgb1,
  newdata = x_test1
)

  actual1 <- y_test1

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_xgb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_xgb1 <- pred_xgb1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_xgb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_xgb1,

    actual1
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_xgb1 <- (

    actual1 -

      pred_xgb1
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_xgb1 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_xgb1),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    #-----------------------------------
    # SAMPLE RESIDUALS
    #-----------------------------------

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_xgb1,

      length(pred_xgb1),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    #-----------------------------------
    # BOOTSTRAP PREDICTIONS
    #-----------------------------------

    boot_xgb1[, b] <- (

      pred_xgb1 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_xgb1[boot_xgb1 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_xgb1 <- apply(

    boot_xgb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_xgb1 <- apply(

    boot_xgb1,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_xgb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_xgb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_xgb1
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_xgb1 <- mean(

    upper_xgb1 -

      lower_xgb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_xgb1 <- rbind(

    results_xgb1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_xgb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_xgb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_xgb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_xgb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_xgb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_xgb1,

      Width = width_xgb1
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_xgb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGB1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb1$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb1$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb1$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb1$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb1$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb1$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb1$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_xgb1
```

## 80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# XGB2 : 80% SPLITS
# XGBOOST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

results_xgb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGB2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

  train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

  train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

  train_2$ white <- factor(train_2$white)

  test_2$hmo <- factor(
    test_2$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_2$type <- factor(
    test_2$type,
    levels = levels(train_2$type)
  )

  test_2$ white <- factor(
    test_2$ white,
    levels = levels(train_2$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  x_train2 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_2
  )[,-1]

  x_test2 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = test_2
  )[,-1]

  y_train2 <- train_2$los

  y_test2 <- test_2$los

  #====================================
  # D MATRIX
  #====================================

  dtrain2 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_train2,

    label = y_train2
  )

  dtest2 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_test2
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT XGBOOST MODEL
  #====================================
model_xgb2 <- xgboost(

  x = x_train2,

  y = y_train2,

  objective = "reg:squarederror",

  nrounds = 100,

  max_depth = 6,

  learning_rate = 0.1
)
 

  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_xgb2 <- predict(
  model_xgb2,
  newdata = x_test2
)

  actual2 <- y_test2

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_xgb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_xgb2 <- pred_xgb2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_xgb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_xgb2,

    actual2
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_xgb2 <- (

    actual2 -

      pred_xgb2
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_xgb2 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_xgb2),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_xgb2,

      length(pred_xgb2),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_xgb2[, b] <- (

      pred_xgb2 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_xgb2[boot_xgb2 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_xgb2 <- apply(

    boot_xgb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_xgb2 <- apply(

    boot_xgb2,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_xgb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_xgb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_xgb2
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_xgb2 <- mean(

    upper_xgb2 -

      lower_xgb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_xgb2 <- rbind(

    results_xgb2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_xgb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_xgb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_xgb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_xgb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_xgb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_xgb2,

      Width = width_xgb2
    )
  )
}
```


```{r}

#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_xgb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGB2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb2$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb2$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb2$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb2$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb2$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb2$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb2$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_xgb2
```

## 90 split   


```{r}
#========================================
# XGB3 : 90% SPLITS
# XGBOOST
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

library(xgboost)
library(forecast)

results_xgb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("XGB3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3 <- split_90[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

  train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

  train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

  train_3$ white<- factor(train_3$ white)

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_3$died <- factor(
    test_3$died,
    levels = levels(train_3$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$ white <- factor(
    test_3$ white,
    levels = levels(train_3$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  x_train3 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = train_3
  )[,-1]

  x_test3 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = test_3
  )[,-1]

  y_train3 <- train_3$los

  y_test3 <- test_3$los

  #====================================
  # D MATRIX
  #====================================

  dtrain3 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_train3,

    label = y_train3
  )

  dtest3 <- xgb.DMatrix(

    data = x_test3
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT XGBOOST MODEL
  #====================================

 model_xgb3 <- xgboost(

  x = x_train3,

  y = y_train3,

  objective = "reg:squarederror",

  nrounds = 100,

  max_depth = 6,

  learning_rate = 0.1
)
  #====================================
  # PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_xgb3 <- predict(
  model_xgb3,
  newdata = x_test3
)

  actual3 <- y_test3

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_xgb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_xgb3 <- pred_xgb3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_xgb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_xgb3,

    actual3
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUALS
  #====================================

  resid_xgb3 <- (

    actual3 -

      pred_xgb3
  )

  #====================================
  # NUMBER OF BOOTSTRAPS
  #====================================

  B <- 1000

  #====================================
  # STORAGE MATRIX
  #====================================

  boot_xgb3 <- matrix(

    NA,

    nrow = length(pred_xgb3),

    ncol = B
  )

  #====================================
  # RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP
  #====================================

  for(b in 1:B){

    res_boot <- sample(

      resid_xgb3,

      length(pred_xgb3),

      replace = TRUE
    )

    boot_xgb3[, b] <- (

      pred_xgb3 +

        res_boot
    )
  }

  #====================================
  # NON-NEGATIVE COUNTS
  #====================================

  boot_xgb3[boot_xgb3 < 0] <- 0

  #====================================
  # PREDICTION INTERVALS
  #====================================

  lower_xgb3 <- apply(

    boot_xgb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.025
  )

  upper_xgb3 <- apply(

    boot_xgb3,

    1,

    quantile,

    probs = 0.975
  )

  #====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #====================================

  coverage_xgb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_xgb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_xgb3
  )

  #====================================
  # WIDTH
  #====================================

  width_xgb3 <- mean(

    upper_xgb3 -

      lower_xgb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_xgb3 <- rbind(

    results_xgb3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_xgb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_xgb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_xgb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_xgb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_xgb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_xgb3,

      Width = width_xgb3
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_xgb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "XGB3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_xgb3$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_xgb3$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_xgb3$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_xgb3$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_xgb3$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_xgb3$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_xgb3$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_xgb3
```

##lightGBM

## 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# LGBM1 : 70% SPLITS
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

results_lgb1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LGBM1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$ white <- factor(train_1$ white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )

  test_1$type <- factor(
    test_1$type,
    levels = levels(train_1$type)
  )

  test_1$ white <- factor(
    test_1$ white,
    levels = levels(train_1$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type +  white,

    data = train_1
  )[,-1]

  X_test1 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = test_1
  )[,-1]

  y_train1 <- train_1$los

  y_test1 <- test_1$los

  #====================================
  # LIGHTGBM DATASET
  #====================================

  dtrain1 <- lgb.Dataset(

    data = X_train1,

    label = y_train1
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETERS
  #====================================

  params1 <- list(

    objective = "regression",

    metric = "rmse",

    learning_rate = 0.1,

    num_leaves = 31
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  lgb_model1 <- lgb.train(

    params = params1,

    data = dtrain1,

    nrounds = 100,

    verbose = -1
  )

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_lgb1 <- predict(

    lgb_model1,

    X_test1
  )

  actual1 <- y_test1

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual1,
    pred_lgb1
  )

  actual1 <- actual1[keep]

  pred_lgb1 <- pred_lgb1[keep]

  if(length(actual1) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_lgb1 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_lgb1,

    actual1
  )

  #=====================================
  # TRAINING RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  train_pred_lgb1 <- predict(

    lgb_model1,

    X_train1
  )

  residuals_lgb1 <- abs(

    train_1$los -

      train_pred_lgb1
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_lgb1 <- quantile(

    residuals_lgb1,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # PI
  #=====================================

  lower_lgb1 <- pmax(

    0,

    pred_lgb1 -

      qhat_lgb1
  )

  upper_lgb1 <- (

    pred_lgb1 +

      qhat_lgb1
  )

  lower_lgb1 <- round(
    lower_lgb1
  )

  upper_lgb1 <- round(
    upper_lgb1
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_lgb1 <- mean(

    actual1 >= lower_lgb1 &

    actual1 <= upper_lgb1
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_lgb1 <- mean(

    upper_lgb1 -

      lower_lgb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE EACH SPLIT
  #====================================

  split_lgb1 <- data.frame(

    Actual = actual1,

    Predicted = pred_lgb1,

    Lower_PI = lower_lgb1,

    Upper_PI = upper_lgb1
  )

  assign(

    paste0(
      "LGBM1_SPLIT_",
      i
    ),

    split_lgb1
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_lgb1 <- rbind(

    results_lgb1,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_lgb1[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_lgb1[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_lgb1[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_lgb1[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_lgb1[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_lgb1,

      Width = width_lgb1
    )
  )

  cat("\n")

  cat(
    "Coverage :",
    coverage_lgb1,
    "\n"
  )

  cat(
    "Width :",
    width_lgb1,
    "\n"
  )
}
```

```{r}

#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_lgb1 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LGBM1",

  Split = "70%",

  Mean_ME = mean(
    results_lgb1$ME,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(
    results_lgb1$RMSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MAE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MPE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(
    results_lgb1$MAPE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(
    results_lgb1$Coverage,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ),

  Mean_Width = mean(
    results_lgb1$Width,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

summary_lgb1
```

# 80 split

```{r}
#========================================
# LGBM2 : 80% SPLITS
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

results_lgb2 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LGBM2 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_2 <- split_80[[i]]$train

  test_2 <- split_80[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_2$hmo <- factor(train_2$hmo)

  train_2$died <- factor(train_2$died)

  train_2$type <- factor(train_2$type)

  train_2$ white<- factor(train_2$ white)

  test_2$hmo <- factor(
    test_2$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_2$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_2$type <- factor(
    test_2$type,
    levels = levels(train_2$type)
  )

  test_2$ white <- factor(
    test_2$white,
    levels = levels(train_2$white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train2 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = train_2
  )[,-1]

  X_test2 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = test_2
  )[,-1]

  y_train2 <- train_2$los

  y_test2 <- test_2$los

  #====================================
  # LIGHTGBM DATASET
  #====================================

  dtrain2 <- lgb.Dataset(

    data = X_train2,

    label = y_train2
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETERS
  #====================================

  params2 <- list(

    objective = "regression",

    metric = "rmse",

    learning_rate = 0.1,

    num_leaves = 31
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  lgb_model2 <- lgb.train(

    params = params2,

    data = dtrain2,

    nrounds = 100,

    verbose = -1
  )

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_lgb2 <- predict(

    lgb_model2,

    X_test2
  )

  actual2 <- y_test2

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual2,
    pred_lgb2
  )

  actual2 <- actual2[keep]

  pred_lgb2 <- pred_lgb2[keep]

  if(length(actual2) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_lgb2 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_lgb2,

    actual2
  )

  #=====================================
  # TRAINING RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  train_pred_lgb2 <- predict(

    lgb_model2,

    X_train2
  )

  residuals_lgb2 <- abs(

    train_2$los -

      train_pred_lgb2
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_lgb2 <- quantile(

    residuals_lgb2,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # PI
  #=====================================

  lower_lgb2 <- pmax(

    0,

    pred_lgb2 -

      qhat_lgb2
  )

  upper_lgb2 <- (

    pred_lgb2 +

      qhat_lgb2
  )

  lower_lgb2 <- round(
    lower_lgb2
  )

  upper_lgb2 <- round(
    upper_lgb2
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_lgb2 <- mean(

    actual2 >= lower_lgb2 &

    actual2 <= upper_lgb2
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_lgb2 <- mean(

    upper_lgb2 -

      lower_lgb2
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_lgb2 <- rbind(

    results_lgb2,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_lgb2[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_lgb2[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_lgb2[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_lgb2[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_lgb2[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_lgb2,

      Width = width_lgb2
    )
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_lgb2 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LGBM2",

  Split = "80%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_lgb2$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_lgb2$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_lgb2$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_lgb2$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_lgb2$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_lgb2$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_lgb2$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_lgb2

```

## 90 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LGBM2 : 80% SPLITS
# LIGHTGBM
# CONFORMAL PI
#========================================

library(lightgbm)
library(forecast)

results_lgb3 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LGBM3 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_3 <- split_90[[i]]$train

  test_3<- split_90[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_3$hmo <- factor(train_3$hmo)

  train_3$died <- factor(train_3$died)

  train_3$type <- factor(train_3$type)

  train_3$ white <- factor(train_3$ white)

  test_3$hmo <- factor(
    test_3$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_3$hmo)
  )

  test_2$died <- factor(
    test_2$died,
    levels = levels(train_2$died)
  )

  test_3$type <- factor(
    test_3$type,
    levels = levels(train_3$type)
  )

  test_3$ white <- factor(
    test_3$ white,
    levels = levels(train_3$ white)
  )

  #====================================
  # MODEL MATRICES
  #====================================

  X_train3 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = train_3
  )[,-1]

  X_test3 <- model.matrix(

    los ~ hmo + died + type + white,

    data = test_3
  )[,-1]

  y_train3 <- train_3$los

  y_test3 <- test_3$los

  #====================================
  # LIGHTGBM DATASET
  #====================================

  dtrain3 <- lgb.Dataset(

    data = X_train3,

    label = y_train3
  )

  #====================================
  # PARAMETERS
  #====================================

  params3 <- list(

    objective = "regression",

    metric = "rmse",

    learning_rate = 0.1,

    num_leaves = 31
  )

  #====================================
  # FIT MODEL
  #====================================

  lgb_model3 <- lgb.train(

    params = params3,

    data = dtrain3,

    nrounds = 100,

    verbose = -1
  )

  #====================================
  # TEST PREDICTIONS
  #====================================

  pred_lgb3 <- predict(

    lgb_model3,

    X_test3
  )

  actual3 <- y_test3

  #====================================
  # REMOVE INVALID VALUES
  #====================================

  keep <- complete.cases(
    actual3,
    pred_lgb3
  )

  actual3 <- actual3[keep]

  pred_lgb3 <- pred_lgb3[keep]

  if(length(actual3) < 2) next

  #====================================
  # FORECAST ACCURACY
  #====================================

  acc_lgb3 <- forecast::accuracy(

    pred_lgb3,

    actual3
  )

  #=====================================
  # TRAINING RESIDUALS
  #=====================================

  train_pred_lgb3 <- predict(

    lgb_model3,

    X_train3
  )

  residuals_lgb3 <- abs(

    train_3$los -

      train_pred_lgb3
  )

  #=====================================
  # CONFORMAL QUANTILE
  #=====================================

  qhat_lgb3 <- quantile(

    residuals_lgb3,

    0.95
  )

  #=====================================
  # PI
  #=====================================

  lower_lgb3 <- pmax(

    0,

    pred_lgb3 -

      qhat_lgb3
  )

  upper_lgb3 <- (

    pred_lgb3 +

      qhat_lgb3
  )

  lower_lgb3 <- round(
    lower_lgb3
  )

  upper_lgb3 <- round(
    upper_lgb3
  )

  #=====================================
  # COVERAGE
  #=====================================

  coverage_lgb3 <- mean(

    actual3 >= lower_lgb3 &

    actual3 <= upper_lgb3
  )

  #=====================================
  # WIDTH
  #=====================================

  width_lgb3 <- mean(

    upper_lgb3 -

      lower_lgb3
  )

  #====================================
  # STORE RESULTS
  #====================================

  results_lgb3 <- rbind(

    results_lgb3,

    data.frame(

      Split = i,

      ME = acc_lgb3[1,"ME"],

      RMSE = acc_lgb3[1,"RMSE"],

      MAE = acc_lgb3[1,"MAE"],

      MPE = acc_lgb3[1,"MPE"],

      MAPE = acc_lgb3[1,"MAPE"],

      Coverage = coverage_lgb3,

      Width = width_lgb3
    )
  )
}
```


```{r}
#====================================
# SUMMARY TABLE
#====================================

summary_lgb3 <- data.frame(

  Model = "LGBM3",

  Split = "90%",

  Mean_ME = mean(results_lgb3$ME,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_RMSE = mean(results_lgb3$RMSE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAE = mean(results_lgb3$MAE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MPE = mean(results_lgb3$MPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_MAPE = mean(results_lgb3$MAPE,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Coverage = mean(results_lgb3$Coverage,na.rm = TRUE),

  Mean_Width = mean(results_lgb3$Width,na.rm = TRUE)
)

summary_lgb3
```


##Glmnet

## 70 split
```{r}
#========================================
# LOAD PACKAGES
#========================================

library(glmnet)
library(forecast)

#========================================
# GLMNET1 : 70% SPLITS
# ELASTIC NET / GLMNET
# RESIDUAL BOOTSTRAP PI
#========================================

results_glmnet1 <- data.frame()

#========================================
# LOOP
#========================================

for(i in 1:100){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("GLMNET1 : SPLIT", i, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  #====================================
  # TRAIN AND TEST
  #====================================

  train_1 <- split_70[[i]]$train

  test_1 <- split_70[[i]]$test

  #====================================
  # FACTOR VARIABLES
  #====================================

  train_1$hmo <- factor(train_1$hmo)

  train_1$died <- factor(train_1$died)

  train_1$type <- factor(train_1$type)

  train_1$ white <- factor(train_1$ white)

  test_1$hmo <- factor(
    test_1$hmo,
    levels = levels(train_1$hmo)
  )

  test_1$died <- factor(
    test_1$died,
    levels = levels(train_1$died)
  )
```
